These optimizations enable online, frame-by-frame tracking by leveraging a temporal memory buffer for efficient feature reuse and utilizing prior motion for accurate track initialization. LiteTracker demonstrates significant runtime improvements being around 7x faster than its predecessor and 2x than the state-of-the-art. Beyond its primary focus on efficiency, LiteTracker delivers high-accuracy tracking and occlusion prediction, performing competitively on both the STIR and SuPer datasets. We believe LiteTracker is an important step toward low-latency tissue tracking for real-time surgical applications in the operating room.
zh

[CV-77] Small Object Detection with YOLO: A Performance Analysis Across Model Versions and Hardware

【速读】：该论文旨在全面评估 YOLO 系列目标检测模型（v5、v8、v9、v10、v11）在不同硬件平台和优化库上的性能表现。论文通过比较这些模型在 Intel 和 AMD CPU 上使用 ONNX 和 OpenVINO 等流行库的推理速度与检测精度，以及在 GPU 上使用 TensorRT 和其他 GPU 优化框架的表现，探讨其在不同硬件环境下的效率与准确性权衡。此外，研究还分析了这些 YOLO 模型对图像中目标大小的敏感性，考察了检测占据图像总面积 1%、2.5% 和 5% 的对象时的性能差异。论文的关键在于揭示模型在效率、精度及目标大小适应性之间的权衡关系，从而为基于特定硬件约束和检测需求的最优模型选择提供指导，帮助从业者有效部署 YOLO 模型以满足实际应用需求。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09900
作者: Muhammad Fasih Tariq,Muhammad Azeem Javed
机构: School of Systems and Technology (系统与技术学院), University of Management and Technology (管理与技术大学)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper provides an extensive evaluation of YOLO object detection models (v5, v8, v9, v10, v11) by com- paring their performance across various hardware platforms and optimization libraries. Our study investigates inference speed and detection accuracy on Intel and AMD CPUs using popular libraries such as ONNX and OpenVINO, as well as on GPUs through TensorRT and other GPU-optimized frameworks. Furthermore, we analyze the sensitivity of these YOLO models to object size within the image, examining performance when detecting objects that occupy 1%, 2.5%, and 5% of the total area of the image. By identifying the trade-offs in efficiency, accuracy, and object size adaptability, this paper offers insights for optimal model selection based on specific hardware constraints and detection requirements, aiding practitioners in deploying YOLO models effectively for real-world applications.
zh

[CV-78] Digital Staining with Knowledge Distillation: A Unified Framework for Unpaired and Paired-But-Misaligned Data

【速读】：该论文旨在解决细胞成像和医学诊断中传统染色方法面临的高成本、耗时、劳动密集以及对组织不可逆改变等挑战。为应对这些难题，论文提出了一种新颖的无监督深度学习框架用于数字细胞染色，其关键在于通过知识蒸馏技术减少了对大规模配对染色与未染色图像数据的需求。具体而言，研究探索了两种训练方案：无配对情况下的两阶段流水线（包括光照增强和着色）作为教师模型，以及配对但错位情况下的扩展版本，后者引入了对齐模块以利用像素级信息。实验结果表明，所提出的无监督深度染色方法在两种设置下均能生成具有更精确细胞目标位置和形状的染色图像，并且在定量指标（如NIQE和PSNR）及定性评估上优于现有方法。此外，该方法已在白细胞数据集上得到应用，展示了其在医学领域的潜力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09899
作者: Ziwang Xu,Lanqing Guo,Satoshi Tsutsui,Shuyan Zhang,Alex C. Kot,Bihan Wen
机构: Rapid-Rich Object Search Lab, Nanyang Technological University (南洋理工大学); The University of Texas at Austin (德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校); Institute of Materials Research and Engineering, Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR)(材料研究与工程研究院, 新加坡科技研究局)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Image and Video Processing (eess.IV)
备注: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Staining is essential in cell imaging and medical diagnostics but poses significant challenges, including high cost, time consumption, labor intensity, and irreversible tissue alterations. Recent advances in deep learning have enabled digital staining through supervised model training. However, collecting large-scale, perfectly aligned pairs of stained and unstained images remains difficult. In this work, we propose a novel unsupervised deep learning framework for digital cell staining that reduces the need for extensive paired data using knowledge distillation. We explore two training schemes: (1) unpaired and (2) paired-but-misaligned settings. For the unpaired case, we introduce a two-stage pipeline, comprising light enhancement followed by colorization, as a teacher model. Subsequently, we obtain a student staining generator through knowledge distillation with hybrid non-reference losses. To leverage the pixel-wise information between adjacent sections, we further extend to the paired-but-misaligned setting, adding the Learning to Align module to utilize pixel-level information. Experiment results on our dataset demonstrate that our proposed unsupervised deep staining method can generate stained images with more accurate positions and shapes of the cell targets in both settings. Compared with competing methods, our method achieves improved results both qualitatively and quantitatively (e.g., NIQE and PSNR).We applied our digital staining method to the White Blood Cell (WBC) dataset, investigating its potential for medical applications.
zh

[CV-79] AMP: Token-Adaptive Layerwise Pruning in Multimodal Large Language Models

【速读】：本文旨在解决多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在后训练剪枝（post-training pruning）过程中效果有限的问题。传统剪枝方法未能充分考虑MLLMs中跨层及模态的独特标记属性，导致剪枝性能不佳。为应对这一挑战，论文提出了一种名为TAMP的简单而有效的剪枝框架，其关键是两个核心组件：(1) 基于多样性感知稀疏性（Diversity-Aware Sparsity），根据多模态输出标记之间的多样性动态调整每层的稀疏比率，在高多样性层保留更多参数；(2) 自适应多模态输入激活（Adaptive Multimodal Input Activation），利用注意力分数识别代表性多模态输入标记，以指导无结构权重剪枝。通过在两种最先进的MLLMs（LLaVA-NeXT和VideoLLaMA2）上的验证，实验结果表明，TAMP的每个组成部分均显著优于现有剪枝技术。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09897
作者: Jaewoo Lee,Keyang Xuan,Chanakya Ekbote,Sandeep Polisetty,Yi R.(May)Fung,Paul Pu Liang
机构: University of North Carolina Chapel Hill (北卡罗来纳大学教堂山分校); University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校); Massachusetts Institute of Technology (麻省理工学院); University of Massachusetts Amherst (马萨诸塞大学阿默斯特分校); Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (香港科技大学)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable versatility in understanding diverse multimodal data and tasks. However, these capabilities come with an increased model scale. While post-training pruning reduces model size in unimodal models, its application to MLLMs often yields limited success. Our analysis discovers that conventional methods fail to account for the unique token attributes across layers and modalities inherent to MLLMs. Inspired by this observation, we propose TAMP, a simple yet effective pruning framework tailored for MLLMs, featuring two key components: (1) Diversity-Aware Sparsity, which adjusts sparsity ratio per layer based on diversities among multimodal output tokens, preserving more parameters in high-diversity layers; and (2) Adaptive Multimodal Input Activation, which identifies representative multimodal input tokens using attention scores to guide unstructured weight pruning. We validate our method on two state-of-the-art MLLMs: LLaVA-NeXT, designed for vision-language tasks, and VideoLLaMA2, capable of processing audio, visual, and language modalities. Empirical experiments across various multimodal evaluation benchmarks demonstrate that each component of our approach substantially outperforms existing pruning techniques.
zh

[CV-80] Enhanced Semantic Extraction and Guidance for UGC Image Super Resolution

【速读】：该论文旨在解决用户生成内容（User-Generated Content, UGC）图像超分辨率领域中，真实世界退化与合成退化之间的差异导致传统方法难以有效泛化的问题。为应对这一挑战，论文提出了一种新颖的方法，通过将语义引导融入扩散框架来提升模型对真实世界失真的建模能力。关键在于：首先，通过在LSDIR数据集上分别模拟退化过程，并结合官方配对训练集来解决野蛮数据集与合成数据集之间的一致性问题；其次，引入预训练的语义提取模型（Semantic Extraction Model, SAM2），并精细调整关键超参数以增强退化去除能力和细节生成，从而实现更高的感知保真度。实验结果验证了该方法优于现有技术，并在CVPR NTIRE 2025短格式UGC图像超分辨率挑战赛中获得第二名。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09887
作者: Yiwen Wang,Ying Liang,Yuxuan Zhang,Xinning Chai,Zhengxue Cheng,Yingsheng Qin,Yucai Yang,Rong Xie,Li Song
机构: Shanghai Jiao Tong University (上海交通大学); Transsion (传音控股)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Due to the disparity between real-world degradations in user-generated content(UGC) images and synthetic degradations, traditional super-resolution methods struggle to generalize effectively, necessitating a more robust approach to model real-world distortions. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to UGC image super-resolution by integrating semantic guidance into a diffusion framework. Our method addresses the inconsistency between degradations in wild and synthetic datasets by separately simulating the degradation processes on the LSDIR dataset and combining them with the official paired training set. Furthermore, we enhance degradation removal and detail generation by incorporating a pretrained semantic extraction model (SAM2) and fine-tuning key hyperparameters for improved perceptual fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach against state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, the proposed model won second place in the CVPR NTIRE 2025 Short-form UGC Image Super-Resolution Challenge, further validating its effectiveness. The code is available at https://github.c10pom/Moonsofang/NTIRE-2025-SRlab.
zh

[CV-81] Separate to Collaborate: Dual-Stream Diffusion Model for Coordinated Piano Hand Motion Synthesis

【速读】：本文旨在解决自动化合成协调的双手钢琴演奏的问题，尤其关注如何捕捉双手之间复杂的协调性同时保留各自独特的运动学特征。论文提出了一种双流神经框架，用于从音频输入生成同步的手部动作。解决方案的关键在于两项创新：(i) 一种基于解耦扩散的生成框架，通过双重噪声初始化独立建模每只手的运动，同时利用共享的位置条件采样每只手的独特潜在噪声；(ii) 手部协调不对称注意力机制（Hand-Coordinated Asymmetric Attention, HCAA），抑制对称噪声以突出不对称的手部特定特征，并在去噪过程中自适应增强双手间的协调性。系统采用分层操作，首先从音频特征预测三维手部位置，然后通过位置感知的扩散模型生成关节角度，其中并行去噪流通过HCAA相互作用。综合评估表明，该框架在多个指标上优于现有最先进的方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09885
作者: Zihao Liu,Mingwen Ou,Zunnan Xu,Jiaqi Huang,Haonan Han,Ronghui Li,Xiu Li
机构: Tsinghua University (清华大学); Sun Yat-Sen University (中山大学)
类目: ound (cs.SD); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: 12 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Automating the synthesis of coordinated bimanual piano performances poses significant challenges, particularly in capturing the intricate choreography between the hands while preserving their distinct kinematic signatures. In this paper, we propose a dual-stream neural framework designed to generate synchronized hand gestures for piano playing from audio input, addressing the critical challenge of modeling both hand independence and coordination. Our framework introduces two key innovations: (i) a decoupled diffusion-based generation framework that independently models each hand’s motion via dual-noise initialization, sampling distinct latent noise for each while leveraging a shared positional condition, and (ii) a Hand-Coordinated Asymmetric Attention (HCAA) mechanism suppresses symmetric (common-mode) noise to highlight asymmetric hand-specific features, while adaptively enhancing inter-hand coordination during denoising. The system operates hierarchically: it first predicts 3D hand positions from audio features and then generates joint angles through position-aware diffusion models, where parallel denoising streams interact via HCAA. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics.
zh

[CV-82] Focus on Local: Finding Reliable Discriminative Regions for Visual Place Recognition AAAI2025

【速读】：该论文旨在解决视觉位置识别（Visual Place Recognition, VPR）任务中因图像中较少判别性局部区域而产生的性能瓶颈问题，同时避免平凡背景区域引入的感知混淆。现有方法在建模和充分利用这些判别性区域方面存在不足。为此，论文提出了一种名为Focus on Local (FoL)的方法，通过挖掘和利用可靠的判别性局部区域，并引入伪相关性监督来同时提升图像检索与重排序性能。其关键在于设计了两种损失函数：提取-聚合空间对齐损失（SAL）和前景-背景对比增强损失（CEL），以显式建模判别性局部区域，并指导全局表示生成及高效重排序；提出了基于聚合全局特征获得的伪对应关系的弱监督局部特征训练策略，缓解了VPR任务中局部对应标注数据稀缺的问题；并通过基于判别性区域引导的高效重排序管道提升了计算效率。实验结果表明，FoL方法在多个VPR基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，并显著优于现有的两阶段VPR方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09881
作者: Changwei Wang,Shunpeng Chen,Yukun Song,Rongtao Xu,Zherui Zhang,Jiguang Zhang,Haoran Yang,Yu Zhang,Kexue Fu,Shide Du,Zhiwei Xu,Longxiang Gao,Li Guo,Shibiao Xu
机构: Unknown
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Accepted by AAAI 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is aimed at predicting the location of a query image by referencing a database of geotagged images. For VPR task, often fewer discriminative local regions in an image produce important effects while mundane background regions do not contribute or even cause perceptual aliasing because of easy overlap. However, existing methods lack precisely modeling and full exploitation of these discriminative regions. In this paper, we propose the Focus on Local (FoL) approach to stimulate the performance of image retrieval and re-ranking in VPR simultaneously by mining and exploiting reliable discriminative local regions in images and introducing pseudo-correlation supervision. First, we design two losses, Extraction-Aggregation Spatial Alignment Loss (SAL) and Foreground-Background Contrast Enhancement Loss (CEL), to explicitly model reliable discriminative local regions and use them to guide the generation of global representations and efficient re-ranking. Second, we introduce a weakly-supervised local feature training strategy based on pseudo-correspondences obtained from aggregating global features to alleviate the lack of local correspondences ground truth for the VPR task. Third, we suggest an efficient re-ranking pipeline that is efficiently and precisely based on discriminative region guidance. Finally, experimental results show that our FoL achieves the state-of-the-art on multiple VPR benchmarks in both image retrieval and re-ranking stages and also significantly outperforms existing two-stage VPR methods in terms of computational efficiency. Code and models are available at this https URL
zh

[CV-83] MCBlock: Boosting Neural Radiance Field Training Speed by MCTS-based Dynamic-Resolution Ray Sampling

【速读】：该论文旨在解决Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) 在训练效率方面的瓶颈问题，特别是现有方法在采样策略上的低效性。NeRF虽以高保真度的新视角合成著称，但即使是最先进的模型（如Gaussian Splatting）仍需耗时数分钟完成训练，无法满足实时应用需求，尤其是在远程医疗等多媒体场景中。当前点采样算法仅部分优化了简单纹理区域与复杂纹理区域的采样策略，而现有射线采样算法仍以像素级细粒度对所有区域进行采样，导致GPU资源浪费。实际上，不同纹理强度的区域需要不同的采样分辨率。

为了解决这一问题，论文提出了一种新颖的动态分辨率射线采样算法MCBlock。其关键在于利用Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) 将每个训练图像划分为不同大小的像素块，并针对这些块进行主动的块级训练。具体而言，通过初始化树结构以反映训练图像的纹理特征来加速初始化过程，同时采用扩展/剪枝模块动态优化块划分策略。实验表明，MCBlock在Nerfstudio中实现了高达2.33倍的训练加速，优于其他射线采样算法。论文认为，MCBlock可适用于任何基于锥形追踪的NeRF模型，并有望推动多媒体领域的进一步发展。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09878
作者: Yunpeng Tan,Junlin Hao,Jiangkai Wu,Liming Liu,Qingyang Li,Xinggong Zhang
机构: Peking University (北京大学); Beijing (北京)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is widely known for high-fidelity novel view synthesis. However, even the state-of-the-art NeRF model, Gaussian Splatting, requires minutes for training, far from the real-time performance required by multimedia scenarios like telemedicine. One of the obstacles is its inefficient sampling, which is only partially addressed by existing works. Existing point-sampling algorithms uniformly sample simple-texture regions (easy to fit) and complex-texture regions (hard to fit), while existing ray-sampling algorithms sample these regions all in the finest granularity (i.e. the pixel level), both wasting GPU training resources. Actually, regions with different texture intensities require different sampling granularities. To this end, we propose a novel dynamic-resolution ray-sampling algorithm, MCBlock, which employs Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to partition each training image into pixel blocks with different sizes for active block-wise training. Specifically, the trees are initialized according to the texture of training images to boost the initialization speed, and an expansion/pruning module dynamically optimizes the block partition. MCBlock is implemented in Nerfstudio, an open-source toolset, and achieves a training acceleration of up to 2.33x, surpassing other ray-sampling algorithms. We believe MCBlock can apply to any cone-tracing NeRF model and contribute to the multimedia community.
zh

[CV-84] HDC: Hierarchical Distillation for Multi-level Noisy Consistency in Semi-Supervised Fetal Ultrasound Segmentation

【速读】：该论文致力于解决宫颈结构在经阴道超声图像中因对比度低、阴影伪影及边界模糊导致的精确分割难题。由于临床超声成像难以获取大规模标注数据，传统基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法受限。此外，现有的半监督学习（SSL）框架常面临确认偏差和高计算成本的问题。为应对这些挑战，论文提出了一种名为HDC的新框架，其关键在于结合了多层级噪声教师模型中的分层蒸馏与一致性学习机制。不同于仅依赖伪标签的传统方法，HDC引入了相关性引导损失（Correlation Guidance Loss）以对齐教师与主学生分支间的特征表示，并通过互信息损失（Mutual Information Loss）稳定主分支与噪声分支间的表示，从而在降低模型复杂度的同时提升泛化能力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09876
作者: Tran Quoc Khanh Le,Nguyen Lan Vi Vu,Ha-Hieu Pham,Xuan-Loc Huynh,Tien-Huy Nguyen,Minh Huu Nhat Le,Quan Nguyen,Hien D. Nguyen
机构: University of Information Technology (胡志明市, 越南); Ho Chi Minh University of Technology (胡志明市, 越南); University of Science (胡志明市, 越南); Vietnam National University (胡志明市, 越南); Boston University (马萨诸塞州, 美国); Taipei Medical University (台北, 台湾); Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology (河内, 越南); New Mexico State University (拉斯克鲁塞斯, 新墨西哥州, 美国)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Transvaginal ultrasound is a critical imaging modality for evaluating cervical anatomy and detecting physiological changes. However, accurate segmentation of cervical structures remains challenging due to low contrast, shadow artifacts, and fuzzy boundaries. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown promising results in medical image segmentation, their performance is often limited by the need for large-scale annotated datasets - an impractical requirement in clinical ultrasound imaging. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) offers a compelling solution by leveraging unlabeled data, but existing teacher-student frameworks often suffer from confirmation bias and high computational costs. We propose HDC, a novel semi-supervised segmentation framework that integrates Hierarchical Distillation and Consistency learning within a multi-level noise mean-teacher framework. Unlike conventional approaches that rely solely on pseudo-labeling, we introduce a hierarchical distillation mechanism that guides feature-level learning via two novel objectives: (1) Correlation Guidance Loss to align feature representations between the teacher and main student branch, and (2) Mutual Information Loss to stabilize representations between the main and noisy student branches. Our framework reduces model complexity while improving generalization. Extensive experiments on two fetal ultrasound datasets, FUGC and PSFH, demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance with significantly lower computational overhead than existing multi-teacher models.
zh

[CV-85] GFT: Gradient Focal Transformer

【速读】：本文旨在解决细粒度图像分类（Fine-Grained Image Classification, FGIC）任务中，现有模型在捕捉全局上下文与局部细节特征之间的不平衡问题。尽管基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的模型在局部特征提取方面表现强劲，但难以有效捕获细粒度识别所需的全局上下文；而基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的模型虽通过注意力驱动机制改进了全局上下文建模，但在自适应聚焦于真正判别性区域的能力上仍显不足。此外，已有方法如TransFG等引入部件感知标记选择策略，但在计算效率、注意力区域选择灵活性以及复杂环境下的细节聚焦能力上仍有局限。

为了解决这些问题，本文提出了GFT（Gradient Focal Transformer），一种新的基于ViT的框架。其核心解决方案包括两个关键模块：一是梯度注意学习对齐（Gradient Attention Learning Alignment, GALA）机制，通过分析注意力梯度流动态优先关注类别判别性特征；二是渐进块选择（Progressive Patch Selection, PPS）策略，逐步过滤掉信息量较少的区域，从而降低计算开销并增强对细微细节的敏感性。GFT在FGVC Aircraft、Food-101和COCO数据集上达到了最先进的性能（SOTA），同时仅使用93M参数，在效率上超越了其他先进的ViT基FGIC模型。通过整合全局上下文与局部细节提取能力，GFT为细粒度图像分类任务设定了新基准，并为实际部署场景提供了可解释性的解决方案。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09852
作者: Boris Kriuk,Simranjit Kaur Gill,Shoaib Aslam,Amir Fakhrutdinov
机构: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (香港科技大学); University of Westminster (西敏斯特大学); University of Engineering & Technology Lahore (拉合尔工程技术大学); Shanghai Jiao Tong University (上海交通大学)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 11 pages, 3 tables, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Fine-Grained Image Classification (FGIC) remains a complex task in computer vision, as it requires models to distinguish between categories with subtle localized visual differences. Well-studied CNN-based models, while strong in local feature extraction, often fail to capture the global context required for fine-grained recognition, while more recent ViT-backboned models address FGIC with attention-driven mechanisms but lack the ability to adaptively focus on truly discriminative regions. TransFG and other ViT-based extensions introduced part-aware token selection to enhance attention localization, yet they still struggle with computational efficiency, attention region selection flexibility, and detail-focus narrative in complex environments. This paper introduces GFT (Gradient Focal Transformer), a new ViT-derived framework created for FGIC tasks. GFT integrates the Gradient Attention Learning Alignment (GALA) mechanism to dynamically prioritize class-discriminative features by analyzing attention gradient flow. Coupled with a Progressive Patch Selection (PPS) strategy, the model progressively filters out less informative regions, reducing computational overhead while enhancing sensitivity to fine details. GFT achieves SOTA accuracy on FGVC Aircraft, Food-101, and COCO datasets with 93M parameters, outperforming ViT-based advanced FGIC models in efficiency. By bridging global context and localized detail extraction, GFT sets a new benchmark in fine-grained recognition, offering interpretable solutions for real-world deployment scenarios.
zh

[CV-86] ST-Booster: An Iterative SpatioTemporal Perception Booster for Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments

【速读】：该论文旨在解决连续环境中视觉与语言导航（Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments, VLN-CE）所面临的两大核心感知挑战：一是缺乏预定义观测点导致的异构视觉记忆和削弱的全局空间相关性；二是三维场景中累积重建误差引入的结构噪声，影响局部特征感知。为应对这些挑战，论文提出了一种迭代时空增强器ST-Booster，通过多粒度感知和指令感知推理提升导航性能。ST-Booster的关键在于其包含三个核心模块：分层时空编码（Hierarchical SpatioTemporal Encoding, HSTE）、多粒度对齐融合（Multi-Granularity Aligned Fusion, MGAF）以及值引导路径点生成（ValueGuided Waypoint Generation, VGWG）。其中，HSTE利用拓扑图编码长期全局记忆，并通过网格地图捕获短期局部细节；MGAF通过几何感知知识融合对齐双地图表示与指令；VGWG则生成指导注意力热图（Guided Attention Heatmaps, GAHs）以显式建模环境与指令的相关性并优化路径点选择。这些模块协同工作，显著提升了复杂且易受干扰环境中的导航性能。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09843
作者: Lu Yue,Dongliang Zhou,Liang Xie,Erwei Yin,Feitian Zhang
机构: Department of Advanced Manufacturing and Robotics, and the State Key Laboratory of Turbulence and Complex Systems, College of Engineering, Peking University (北京大学); Harbin Institute of Technology (哈尔滨工业大学); Defense Innovation Institute, Academy of Military Sciences (军事科学院国防创新研究院); Tianjin Artificial Intelligence Innovation Center (天津人工智能创新中心)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Robotics (cs.RO)
备注: 11 pages, 7 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) requires agents to navigate unknown, continuous spaces based on natural language instructions. Compared to discrete settings, VLN-CE poses two core perception challenges. First, the absence of predefined observation points leads to heterogeneous visual memories and weakened global spatial correlations. Second, cumulative reconstruction errors in three-dimensional scenes introduce structural noise, impairing local feature perception. To address these challenges, this paper proposes ST-Booster, an iterative spatiotemporal booster that enhances navigation performance through multi-granularity perception and instruction-aware reasoning. ST-Booster consists of three key modules – Hierarchical SpatioTemporal Encoding (HSTE), Multi-Granularity Aligned Fusion (MGAF), and ValueGuided Waypoint Generation (VGWG). HSTE encodes long-term global memory using topological graphs and captures shortterm local details via grid maps. MGAF aligns these dualmap representations with instructions through geometry-aware knowledge fusion. The resulting representations are iteratively refined through pretraining tasks. During reasoning, VGWG generates Guided Attention Heatmaps (GAHs) to explicitly model environment-instruction relevance and optimize waypoint selection. Extensive comparative experiments and performance analyses are conducted, demonstrating that ST-Booster outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly in complex, disturbance-prone environments.
zh

[CV-87] FATE: A Prompt-Tuning-Based Semi-Supervised Learning Framework for Extremely Limited Labeled Data

【速读】：该论文致力于解决半监督学习（Semi-Supervised Learning, SSL）在极少量标注数据（如单一样本）场景下的有效性问题。现有方法难以从头训练或在利用预训练模型时无法有效平衡有限标注数据与大量未标注数据之间的关系。论文提出的关键解决方案是FATE（Firstly Adapt, Then catEgorize），一种针对极少量标注数据场景设计的新型SSL框架。其核心在于两阶段提示微调范式：首先通过大量未标注数据无监督地调整预训练模型以适应下游任务的数据特征分布；然后应用专为预训练模型设计的SSL方法完成最终分类任务。这种方法旨在兼容视觉及视觉-语言预训练模型，并通过实验验证显著提升了性能，在七个基准测试中平均性能提升达33.74%，从而有效缓解了标注样本稀缺带来的挑战。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09828
作者: Hezhao Liu,Yang Lu,Mengke Li,Yiqun Zhang,Shreyank N Gowda,Chen Gong,Hanzi Wang
机构: Xiamen University(Xiamen University); Xiamen University(Xiamen University); Guangdong Laboratory of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Economy (SZ)(广东人工智能与数字经济实验室（深圳）); Guangdong University of Technology(Guangdong University of Technology); University of Nottingham(诺丁汉大学); Nanjing University of Science and Technology(Nanjing University of Science and Technology); Xiamen University(Xiamen University)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved significant progress by leveraging both labeled data and unlabeled data. Existing SSL methods overlook a common real-world scenario when labeled data is extremely scarce, potentially as limited as a single labeled sample in the dataset. General SSL approaches struggle to train effectively from scratch under such constraints, while methods utilizing pre-trained models often fail to find an optimal balance between leveraging limited labeled data and abundant unlabeled data. To address this challenge, we propose Firstly Adapt, Then catEgorize (FATE), a novel SSL framework tailored for scenarios with extremely limited labeled data. At its core, the two-stage prompt tuning paradigm FATE exploits unlabeled data to compensate for scarce supervision signals, then transfers to downstream tasks. Concretely, FATE first adapts a pre-trained model to the feature distribution of downstream data using volumes of unlabeled samples in an unsupervised manner. It then applies an SSL method specifically designed for pre-trained models to complete the final classification task. FATE is designed to be compatible with both vision and vision-language pre-trained models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FATE effectively mitigates challenges arising from the scarcity of labeled samples in SSL, achieving an average performance improvement of 33.74% across seven benchmarks compared to state-of-the-art SSL methods. Code is available at this https URL.
zh

[CV-88] Density-based Object Detection in Crowded Scenes

【速读】：该论文旨在解决在拥挤场景中目标检测面临的两个主要问题：1）训练过程中因高度重叠实例导致的锚点（anchors）更模糊；2）推理阶段后处理中更容易错误抑制预测结果。为了解决这些问题，论文提出了两种新策略——密度引导锚点（Density-Guided Anchors, DGA）和密度引导非极大值抑制（Density-Guided NMS, DG-NMS）。关键在于利用对象密度图联合计算最优锚点分配与重新加权，并采用自适应NMS。具体而言，基于不平衡最优传输（Unbalanced Optimal Transport, UOT）问题，每个真实目标的密度以最小传输成本分配到每个锚点位置，从而形成锚点上的实例特定密度分布，DGA从中解码出最优锚点分配和重新加权策略。同时，DG-NMS通过预测的密度图自适应调整NMS阈值以减少误抑制。此外，设计了一种新颖的重叠感知传输代价，专门针对由邻近重叠对象引起的模糊锚点。实验表明，所提出的密度引导检测器在CrowdHuman和CityPersons数据集上对拥挤场景表现出了有效性和鲁棒性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09819
作者: Chenyang Zhao,Jia Wan,Antoni B. Chan
机构: Department of Computer Science, City University of Hong Kong (香港城市大学计算机科学系)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Compared with the generic scenes, crowded scenes contain highly-overlapped instances, which result in: 1) more ambiguous anchors during training of object detectors, and 2) more predictions are likely to be mistakenly suppressed in post-processing during inference. To address these problems, we propose two new strategies, density-guided anchors (DGA) and density-guided NMS (DG-NMS), which uses object density maps to jointly compute optimal anchor assignments and reweighing, as well as an adaptive NMS. Concretely, based on an unbalanced optimal transport (UOT) problem, the density owned by each ground-truth object is transported to each anchor position at a minimal transport cost. And density on anchors comprises an instance-specific density distribution, from which DGA decodes the optimal anchor assignment and re-weighting strategy. Meanwhile, DG-NMS utilizes the predicted density map to adaptively adjust the NMS threshold to reduce mistaken suppressions. In the UOT, a novel overlap-aware transport cost is specifically designed for ambiguous anchors caused by overlapped neighboring objects. Extensive experiments on the challenging CrowdHuman dataset with Citypersons dataset demonstrate that our proposed density-guided detector is effective and robust to crowdedness. The code and pre-trained models will be made available later.
zh

[CV-89] DUDA: Distilled Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Lightweight Semantic Segmentation

【速读】：该论文旨在解决现有无监督领域自适应（UDA）方法在轻量级模型上性能显著下降的问题。这一问题源于架构上的固有僵化，导致生成的质量较低的伪标签。为了解决此问题，论文提出了一种名为蒸馏无监督领域自适应（DUDA）的新框架。其关键是结合基于指数移动平均（EMA）的自训练与知识蒸馏（KD），通过引入一个辅助学生网络来弥合重型与轻量级模型之间的架构差距，从而提高伪标签质量。此外，DUDA 还通过渐进式蒸馏、优先考虑适应较差类别的不一致性损失以及多教师学习等创新元素，进一步优化了UDA 和 KD 的融合策略。实验结果表明，DUDA 在多个UDA基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，尤其在轻量级模型上的表现优于其他方法中的重型模型。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09814
作者: Beomseok Kang,Niluthpol Chowdhury Mithun,Abhinav Rajvanshi,Han-Pang Chiu,Supun Samarasekera
机构: Georgia Institute of Technology (乔治亚理工学院); SRI International (SRI国际)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) is essential for enabling semantic segmentation in new domains without requiring costly pixel-wise annotations. State-of-the-art (SOTA) UDA methods primarily use self-training with architecturally identical teacher and student networks, relying on Exponential Moving Average (EMA) updates. However, these approaches face substantial performance degradation with lightweight models due to inherent architectural inflexibility leading to low-quality pseudo-labels. To address this, we propose Distilled Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (DUDA), a novel framework that combines EMA-based self-training with knowledge distillation (KD). Our method employs an auxiliary student network to bridge the architectural gap between heavyweight and lightweight models for EMA-based updates, resulting in improved pseudo-label quality. DUDA employs a strategic fusion of UDA and KD, incorporating innovative elements such as gradual distillation from large to small networks, inconsistency loss prioritizing poorly adapted classes, and learning with multiple teachers. Extensive experiments across four UDA benchmarks demonstrate DUDA’s superiority in achieving SOTA performance with lightweight models, often surpassing the performance of heavyweight models from other approaches.
zh

[CV-90] IGL-DT: Iterative Global-Local Feature Learning with Dual-Teacher Semantic Segmentation Framework under Limited Annotation Scheme

【速读】：该论文旨在解决半监督语义分割（Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation, SSSS）中全局语义表示与细粒度局部特征提取难以平衡的问题。现有方法在利用少量标注数据和大量未标注数据提升分割精度的同时，往往无法兼顾这两方面的有效融合。为应对这一挑战，论文提出了一种名为IGL-DT的新型三分支半监督分割框架，其关键在于引入双教师策略，并结合全局上下文学习（Global Context Learning）通过SwinUnet实现高阶语义引导，以及局部区域学习（Local Regional Learning）通过ResUnet进行细节特征优化。此外，差异学习（Discrepancy Learning）机制进一步缓解了对单一教师模型的过度依赖，促进了自适应特征学习。实验结果表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上超越了现有最先进方法，实现了更优的分割性能。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09797
作者: Dinh Dai Quan Tran,Hoang-Thien Nguyen. Thanh-Huy Nguyen,Gia-Van To,Tien-Huy Nguyen,Quan Nguyen
机构: National Chung Cheng University (国立中正大学), Taiwan; Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam; Université de Bourgogne (第戎大学), Dijon, France; Institut de Science Financière et d’Assurances (金融与保险学院), Lyon, France; University of Information Technology, VNU-HCM, Vietnam; Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology, Hanoi, Vietnam
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 10 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation (SSSS) aims to improve segmentation accuracy by leveraging a small set of labeled images alongside a larger pool of unlabeled data. Recent advances primarily focus on pseudo-labeling, consistency regularization, and co-training strategies. However, existing methods struggle to balance global semantic representation with fine-grained local feature extraction. To address this challenge, we propose a novel tri-branch semi-supervised segmentation framework incorporating a dual-teacher strategy, named IGL-DT. Our approach employs SwinUnet for high-level semantic guidance through Global Context Learning and ResUnet for detailed feature refinement via Local Regional Learning. Additionally, a Discrepancy Learning mechanism mitigates over-reliance on a single teacher, promoting adaptive feature learning. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, achieving superior segmentation performance across various data regimes.
zh

[CV-91] EquiVDM: Equivariant Video Diffusion Models with Temporally Consistent Noise

【速读】：该论文致力于解决视频扩散模型在跨领域应用（如仿真到真实场景转换、风格迁移、视频超分辨率等）中生成时序一致性视频的问题。论文的关键在于提出了一种利用时序一致噪声的视频扩散框架，无需引入专门模块或额外约束即可生成连贯的视频帧。其核心解决方案的关键在于，通过在扩散模型的标准训练目标中结合时序一致噪声，促使模型对输入视频及其噪声的空间变换具有等变性（equivariance），从而更好地捕捉并遵循输入视频中的运动模式，实现对齐的运动轨迹与高保真度的帧生成。此外，进一步扩展至3D一致性生成任务，通过将噪声作为纹理附加到3D网格上，确保仿真到真实场景应用中的3D一致性。实验结果表明，该方法在运动对齐、3D一致性及视频质量方面超越现有先进基线，且实际应用中仅需较少的采样步骤。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09789
作者: Chao Liu,Arash Vahdat
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Temporally consistent video-to-video generation is essential for applications of video diffusion models in areas such as sim-to-real, style-transfer, video upsampling, etc. In this paper, we propose a video diffusion framework that leverages temporally consistent noise to generate coherent video frames without specialized modules or additional constraints. We show that the standard training objective of diffusion models, when applied with temporally consistent noise, encourages the model to be equivariant to spatial transformations in input video and noise. This enables our model to better follow motion patterns from the input video, producing aligned motion and high-fidelity frames. Furthermore, we extend our approach to 3D-consistent video generation by attaching noise as textures on 3D meshes, ensuring 3D consistency in sim-to-real applications. Experimental results demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines in motion alignment, 3D consistency, and video quality while requiring only a few sampling steps in practice.
zh

[CV-92] On the representation of stack operators by mathematical morphology

【速读】：该论文试图解决灰度图像处理中的算子设计问题，旨在通过引入灰度图像堆栈算子（stack operators）来简化复杂灰度图像变换的设计。论文的关键在于证明灰度图像堆栈算子能够继承特征集算子的格结构属性，并且可以通过将二值图像算子扩展到灰度图像来实现特定的图像处理任务。这一解决方案的核心在于利用平移不变且局部定义的堆栈算子，通过推导其特征函数、核以及基表示来实现上述性质。这表明，对于某些灰度图像处理问题，只需先设计适用于二值图像的算子，再通过堆栈算子扩展即可，从而显著简化设计流程。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09766
作者: Diego Marcondes
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces the class of grey-scale image stack operators as those that (a) map binary-images into binary-images and (b) commute in average with cross-sectioning. We show that stack operators are 1-Lipchitz extensions of set operators which can be represented by applying a characteristic set operator to the cross-sections of the image and summing. In particular, they are a generalisation of stack filters, for which the characteristic set operators are increasing. Our main result is that stack operators inherit lattice properties of the characteristic set operators. We focus on the case of translation-invariant and locally defined stack operators and show the main result by deducing the characteristic function, kernel, and basis representation of stack operators. The results of this paper have implications on the design of image operators, since imply that to solve some grey-scale image processing problems it is enough to design an operator for performing the desired transformation on binary images, and then considering its extension given by a stack operator. We leave many topics for future research regarding the machine learning of stack operators and the characterisation of the image processing problems that can be solved by them.
zh

[CV-93] Socratic Chart: Cooperating Multiple Agents for Robust SVG Chart Understanding

【速读】：该论文试图解决多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在图表推理任务中无法真正展现视觉理解能力的问题，具体表现为现有基准如ChartQA显示模型更多依赖于基于文本的捷径和概率模式匹配，而非真正的视觉推理。为严格评估视觉推理能力，作者通过移除图表中的文本标签并引入图表扰动来构建更具挑战性的测试场景。结果显示，像GPT-4o和Gemini-2.0 Pro这样的模型性能下降可达30%，揭示了其局限性。

为应对这些挑战，论文提出了一种名为Socratic Chart的新框架，该框架将图表图像转换为可扩展矢量图形（SVG）表示形式，使MLLMs能够整合文本和视觉模态以增强图表理解。关键在于Socratic Chart采用了一个多智能体管道，包括专门的智能体生成器用于提取原始图表属性（如条形高度、线条坐标），以及智能体批评者用于验证结果，从而确保高保真符号化表示。这一方案显著提升了捕捉图表元素的准确性及推理性能，为推动MLLMs的视觉理解能力奠定了坚实基础。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09764
作者: Yuyang Ji,Haohan Wang
机构: University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (伊利诺伊大学香槟分校)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable versatility but face challenges in demonstrating true visual understanding, particularly in chart reasoning tasks. Existing benchmarks like ChartQA reveal significant reliance on text-based shortcuts and probabilistic pattern-matching rather than genuine visual reasoning. To rigorously evaluate visual reasoning, we introduce a more challenging test scenario by removing textual labels and introducing chart perturbations in the ChartQA dataset. Under these conditions, models like GPT-4o and Gemini-2.0 Pro experience up to a 30% performance drop, underscoring their limitations. To address these challenges, we propose Socratic Chart, a new framework that transforms chart images into Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) representations, enabling MLLMs to integrate textual and visual modalities for enhanced chart understanding. Socratic Chart employs a multi-agent pipeline with specialized agent-generators to extract primitive chart attributes (e.g., bar heights, line coordinates) and an agent-critic to validate results, ensuring high-fidelity symbolic representations. Our framework surpasses state-of-the-art models in accurately capturing chart primitives and improving reasoning performance, establishing a robust pathway for advancing MLLM visual understanding.
zh

[CV-94] Automatic Detection of Intro and Credits in Video using CLIP and Multihead Attention

【速读】：该论文旨在解决视频中“片头/片尾字幕与主体内容过渡”的检测问题，这是视频内容分割、索引和推荐系统中的关键任务。传统方法依赖人工标注，耗时且易出错，而基于启发式的算法难以适应多样化的视频风格。论文提出了一种基于深度学习的解决方案，将问题形式化为序列到序列的分类任务，通过对视频每一秒进行“片头”或“主体内容”的标签预测来实现自动检测。其关键技术在于利用CLIP模型提取帧特征，并结合多头注意力机制与学习到的位置编码处理这些特征表示，从而实现高效且准确的分类。这一方法在测试集上取得了F1-score为91.0%、Precision为89.0%、Recall为97.0%的性能表现，同时优化了实时推理能力，在CPU和高端GPU上的运行速度分别达到11.5 FPS和107 FPS。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09738
作者: Vasilii Korolkov,Andrey Yanchenko
机构: Binat, Inc. (Binat公司); Independent Researcher, USA (美国独立研究员)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Multimedia (cs.MM)
备注: 22 pages, 11 figures, submitted as a preprint. ArXiv preprint only, not submitted to a journal yet

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Detecting transitions between intro/credits and main content in videos is a crucial task for content segmentation, indexing, and recommendation systems. Manual annotation of such transitions is labor-intensive and error-prone, while heuristic-based methods often fail to generalize across diverse video styles. In this work, we introduce a deep learning-based approach that formulates the problem as a sequence-to-sequence classification task, where each second of a video is labeled as either “intro” or “film.” Our method extracts frames at a fixed rate of 1 FPS, encodes them using CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), and processes the resulting feature representations with a multihead attention model incorporating learned positional encoding. The system achieves an F1-score of 91.0%, Precision of 89.0%, and Recall of 97.0% on the test set, and is optimized for real-time inference, achieving 11.5 FPS on CPU and 107 FPS on high-end GPUs. This approach has practical applications in automated content indexing, highlight detection, and video summarization. Future work will explore multimodal learning, incorporating audio features and subtitles to further enhance detection accuracy.
zh

[CV-95] A Survey on Efficient Vision-Language Models

【速读】：该论文旨在解决视觉-语言模型（Vision-Language Models, VLMs）在边缘设备和资源受限设备上的高效部署问题，特别是其高计算需求对实时应用带来的挑战。论文的关键在于综述优化VLM的技术方法，包括紧凑型VLM架构与框架的设计，并深入分析高效VLM在性能与内存占用之间的权衡。通过建立GitHub仓库整合相关文献，作者希望推动该领域的进一步研究。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09724
作者: Gaurav Shinde,Anuradha Ravi,Emon Dey,Shadman Sakib,Milind Rampure,Nirmalya Roy
机构: University of Maryland Baltimore County (UMBC)(马里兰大学巴尔的摩县分校)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 35 pages, 16 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual and textual information, enabling a wide range of applications such as image captioning and visual question answering, making them crucial for modern AI systems. However, their high computational demands pose challenges for real-time applications. This has led to a growing focus on developing efficient vision language models. In this survey, we review key techniques for optimizing VLMs on edge and resource-constrained devices. We also explore compact VLM architectures, frameworks and provide detailed insights into the performance-memory trade-offs of efficient VLMs. Furthermore, we establish a GitHub repository at this https URL to compile all surveyed papers, which we will actively update. Our objective is to foster deeper research in this area.
zh

[CV-96] he Structural Safety Generalization Problem

【速读】：该论文试图解决大语言模型（LLM）的安全性挑战，特别是安全机制未能在语义等价输入中有效泛化的问题。论文聚焦于通过设计具备可解释性、跨模型迁移性和跨目标迁移性的攻击来研究这一关键失败机制。解决方案的关键在于提出了一种名为“结构重写护栏”（Structure Rewriting Guardrail）的防御方法，该方法将输入转换为更利于安全性评估的结构，从而显著提高对有害输入的拒绝率，同时避免过度拒绝良性输入。通过这一中间挑战的解决，论文为长期AI安全研究指出了一个重要的里程碑。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09712
作者: Julius Broomfield,Tom Gibbs,Ethan Kosak-Hine,George Ingebretsen,Tia Nasir,Jason Zhang,Reihaneh Iranmanesh,Sara Pieri,Reihaneh Rabbany,Kellin Pelrine
机构: Cranberry-Lemon University (cranberry-lemon.edu); University of the Witwatersrand (wits.ac.za); Georgia Tech; Mila; UC Berkeley; Stanford; MBZUAI; McGill
类目: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:LLM jailbreaks are a widespread safety challenge. Given this problem has not yet been tractable, we suggest targeting a key failure mechanism: the failure of safety to generalize across semantically equivalent inputs. We further focus the target by requiring desirable tractability properties of attacks to study: explainability, transferability between models, and transferability between goals. We perform red-teaming within this framework by uncovering new vulnerabilities to multi-turn, multi-image, and translation-based attacks. These attacks are semantically equivalent by our design to their single-turn, single-image, or untranslated counterparts, enabling systematic comparisons; we show that the different structures yield different safety outcomes. We then demonstrate the potential for this framework to enable new defenses by proposing a Structure Rewriting Guardrail, which converts an input to a structure more conducive to safety assessment. This guardrail significantly improves refusal of harmful inputs, without over-refusing benign ones. Thus, by framing this intermediate challenge - more tractable than universal defenses but essential for long-term safety - we highlight a critical milestone for AI safety research.
zh

[CV-97] oolTipNet: A Segmentation-Driven Deep Learning Baseline for Surgical Instrument Tip Detection

【速读】：该论文旨在解决机器人辅助腹腔镜根治性前列腺切除术（RALP）中工具尖端位置注册精度不足的问题，当前方法依赖于da Vinci API获取的不准确位置数据，并需进行手眼标定。此外，在手术技能评估与手术自动化等任务中，工具尖端检测亦为核心需求，但因工具尺寸小且器械具有可动关节而极具挑战性。论文提出的关键解决方案是基于分割基础模型（Segment Anything）实现的器械部分级分割掩码输入的深度学习工具尖端检测方法，通过对比传统手工图像处理方法的实验验证了所提方法在模拟及真实数据集上的优越性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09700
作者: Zijian Wu,Shuojue Yang,Yueming Jin,Septimiu E Salcudean
机构: Robotics and Control Laboratory (RCL), Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, the University of British Columbia (英属哥伦比亚大学), Vancouver, Canada; Department of Biomedical Engineering, National University of Singapore (新加坡国立大学), Singapore
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In robot-assisted laparoscopic radical prostatectomy (RALP), the location of the instrument tip is important to register the ultrasound frame with the laparoscopic camera frame. A long-standing limitation is that the instrument tip position obtained from the da Vinci API is inaccurate and requires hand-eye calibration. Thus, directly computing the position of the tool tip in the camera frame using the vision-based method becomes an attractive solution. Besides, surgical instrument tip detection is the key component of other tasks, like surgical skill assessment and surgery automation. However, this task is challenging due to the small size of the tool tip and the articulation of the surgical instrument. Surgical instrument segmentation becomes relatively easy due to the emergence of the Segmentation Foundation Model, i.e., Segment Anything. Based on this advancement, we explore the deep learning-based surgical instrument tip detection approach that takes the part-level instrument segmentation mask as input. Comparison experiments with a hand-crafted image-processing approach demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method on simulated and real datasets.
zh

[CV-98] Computer-Aided Layout Generation for Building Design: A Review

【速读】：该论文旨在系统性地回顾建筑布局设计与生成领域的三个主要研究主题：平面图布局生成、场景布局合成以及其它形式建筑布局的生成。论文的关键在于综合分析不同研究范式，包括基于建筑学或机器学习领域的分类方法，以及根据用户输入条件或约束进行的分类。此外，论文介绍了常用的基准数据集及其对应的评估指标，以验证相关方法的有效性。最终，论文指出了现有方法已解决的问题及局限性，并提出了未来研究的潜在方向。论文的核心解决方案在于利用深度生成模型显著提升生成布局的真实感与多样性，从而大幅减少设计师的工作负担并提高效率。相关资源维护项目可在awesome-building-layout-generation获取。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09694
作者: Jiachen Liu,Yuan Xue,Haomiao Ni,Rui Yu,Zihan Zhou,Sharon X. Huang
机构: The Pennsylvania State University (宾夕法尼亚州立大学); The Ohio State University (俄亥俄州立大学); University of Memphis (孟菲斯大学); University of Louisville (路易斯维尔大学); Manycore Tech Inc (Manycore Tech Inc)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: CVMJ 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Generating realistic building layouts for automatic building design has been studied in both the computer vision and architecture domains. Traditional approaches from the architecture domain, which are based on optimization techniques or heuristic design guidelines, can synthesize desirable layouts, but usually require post-processing and involve human interaction in the design pipeline, making them costly and timeconsuming. The advent of deep generative models has significantly improved the fidelity and diversity of the generated architecture layouts, reducing the workload by designers and making the process much more efficient. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive review of three major research topics of architecture layout design and generation: floorplan layout generation, scene layout synthesis, and generation of some other formats of building layouts. For each topic, we present an overview of the leading paradigms, categorized either by research domains (architecture or machine learning) or by user input conditions or constraints. We then introduce the commonly-adopted benchmark datasets that are used to verify the effectiveness of the methods, as well as the corresponding evaluation metrics. Finally, we identify the well-solved problems and limitations of existing approaches, then propose new perspectives as promising directions for future research in this important research area. A project associated with this survey to maintain the resources is available at awesome-building-layout-generation.
zh

[CV-99] LightHeadEd: Relightable Editable Head Avatars from a Smartphone

【速读】：该论文旨在解决利用传统昂贵的Lightstage设备（多台校准相机）创建高质量可重新照明的3D人脸 avatar 的高成本问题，以促进其广泛应用。论文的关键在于提出了一种新颖且经济高效的方法，仅使用配备偏振滤镜的智能手机即可实现这一目标。核心解决方案的关键在于通过在暗室中使用单点光源同时捕获交叉偏振和平行偏振视频流，分离皮肤在动态面部表演中的漫反射和镜面反射成分。此外，引入了一种嵌入UV空间的混合表示法，结合参数化头模型中的2D高斯分布，以支持高效的实时渲染并保留高保真的几何细节。这使得通过基于学习的神经分析-综合管道能够将姿态和表情相关的几何偏移与外观解耦，并分解表面为albedo、法线和镜面UV纹理图以及环境贴图。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09671
作者: Pranav Manu,Astitva Srivastava,Amit Raj,Varun Jampani,Avinash Sharma,P.J. Narayanan
机构: IIIT Hyderabad; Google Research (谷歌研究); Stability AI; IIT Jodhpur (印度技术学院乔杜尔); IIIT Hyderabad; IIIT Hyderabad
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Creating photorealistic, animatable, and relightable 3D head avatars traditionally requires expensive Lightstage with multiple calibrated cameras, making it inaccessible for widespread adoption. To bridge this gap, we present a novel, cost-effective approach for creating high-quality relightable head avatars using only a smartphone equipped with polaroid filters. Our approach involves simultaneously capturing cross-polarized and parallel-polarized video streams in a dark room with a single point-light source, separating the skin’s diffuse and specular components during dynamic facial performances. We introduce a hybrid representation that embeds 2D Gaussians in the UV space of a parametric head model, facilitating efficient real-time rendering while preserving high-fidelity geometric details. Our learning-based neural analysis-by-synthesis pipeline decouples pose and expression-dependent geometrical offsets from appearance, decomposing the surface into albedo, normal, and specular UV texture maps, along with the environment maps. We collect a unique dataset of various subjects performing diverse facial expressions and head movements.
zh

[CV-100] Uncertainty Guided Refinement for Fine-Grained Salient Object Detection

【速读】：该论文针对现有显著物体检测（Saliency Object Detection, SOD）方法在预测显著区域时常包含未饱和区域和阴影的问题，试图提升模型的可靠细粒度预测能力。为解决此问题，论文引入不确定性引导学习（Uncertainty Guidance Learning）方法，并设计了一种新颖的不确定性引导细化注意网络（Uncertainty Guided Refinement Attention Network, UGRAN）。UGRAN的关键在于其包含三个重要模块：多级交互注意模块（Multilevel Interaction Attention, MIA），用于促进多级特征之间的交互与感知；尺度空间一致注意模块（Scale Spatial-Consistent Attention, SSCA），用于全面整合多尺度特征中的显著信息；以及不确定性细化注意模块（Uncertainty Refinement Attention, URA），利用由显著性预测图生成的不确定性图增强模型对不确定区域的感知能力。此外，论文还提出自适应动态划分机制（Adaptive Dynamic Partition, ADP），以降低URA模块的计算开销并提高不确定性引导的有效性。实验结果表明，UGRAN在七个基准数据集上的表现优于当前最先进的方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09666
作者: Yao Yuan,Pan Gao,Qun Dai,Jie Qin,Wei Xiang
机构: Collge of Computer Science and Technology, Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics (南京航空航天大学计算机科学与技术学院); Key Laboratory of Brain-Machine Intelligence Technology, Ministry of Education (脑机智能技术教育部重点实验室); School of Computing, Engineering and Mathematical Sciences, La Trobe University (拉筹伯大学计算、工程与数学科学学院)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, salient object detection (SOD) methods have achieved impressive performance. However, salient regions predicted by existing methods usually contain unsaturated regions and shadows, which limits the model for reliable fine-grained predictions. To address this, we introduce the uncertainty guidance learning approach to SOD, intended to enhance the model’s perception of uncertain regions. Specifically, we design a novel Uncertainty Guided Refinement Attention Network (UGRAN), which incorporates three important components, i.e., the Multilevel Interaction Attention (MIA) module, the Scale Spatial-Consistent Attention (SSCA) module, and the Uncertainty Refinement Attention (URA) module. Unlike conventional methods dedicated to enhancing features, the proposed MIA facilitates the interaction and perception of multilevel features, leveraging the complementary characteristics among multilevel features. Then, through the proposed SSCA, the salient information across diverse scales within the aggregated features can be integrated more comprehensively and integrally. In the subsequent steps, we utilize the uncertainty map generated from the saliency prediction map to enhance the model’s perception capability of uncertain regions, generating a highly-saturated fine-grained saliency prediction map. Additionally, we devise an adaptive dynamic partition (ADP) mechanism to minimize the computational overhead of the URA module and improve the utilization of uncertainty guidance. Experiments on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed UGRAN over the state-of-the-art methodologies. Codes will be released at this https URL.
zh

[CV-101] KeyVID: Keyframe-Aware Video Diffusion for Audio-Synchronized Visual Animation

【速读】：该论文试图解决在低帧率条件下，由音频生成视频时难以捕捉戏剧性动作中的关键瞬间以及增加帧数导致内存消耗显著上升的问题。为了解决这一问题，论文提出了一种名为KeyVID的关键帧感知音频到视觉动画框架。KeyVID的关键之处在于引入了关键帧定位机制，通过从音频信号中定位关键帧时间步，并利用关键帧生成器生成对应的视觉关键帧，最后借助运动插值器生成中间帧。这种方法不仅显著提升了关键时刻的生成质量，同时保持了计算效率。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09656
作者: Xingrui Wang,Jiang Liu,Ze Wang,Xiaodong Yu,Jialian Wu,Ximeng Sun,Yusheng Su,Alan Yuille,Zicheng Liu,Emad Barsoum
机构: Advanced Micro Devices; Johns Hopkins University
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Generating video from various conditions, such as text, image, and audio, enables both spatial and temporal control, leading to high-quality generation results. Videos with dramatic motions often require a higher frame rate to ensure smooth motion. Currently, most audio-to-visual animation models use uniformly sampled frames from video clips. However, these uniformly sampled frames fail to capture significant key moments in dramatic motions at low frame rates and require significantly more memory when increasing the number of frames directly. In this paper, we propose KeyVID, a keyframe-aware audio-to-visual animation framework that significantly improves the generation quality for key moments in audio signals while maintaining computation efficiency. Given an image and an audio input, we first localize keyframe time steps from the audio. Then, we use a keyframe generator to generate the corresponding visual keyframes. Finally, we generate all intermediate frames using the motion interpolator. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that KeyVID significantly improves audio-video synchronization and video quality across multiple datasets, particularly for highly dynamic motions. The code is released in this https URL.
zh

[CV-102] RANSAC Revisited: An Improved Algorithm for Robust Subspace Recovery under Adversarial and Noisy Corruptions

【速读】：本文研究了在强对抗性污染和高斯噪声同时存在的情况下鲁棒子空间恢复（Robust Subspace Recovery, RSR）的问题。论文旨在利用有限的含噪样本恢复一个低维子空间，该子空间能够近似包含大部分未被污染的样本，且误差与高斯噪声规模成比例。现有方法通常面临计算成本高昂或依赖于限制性的分布假设的问题，限制了其在真正对抗性环境中的适用性。为了解决这些问题，本文重新审视了经典的随机采样一致性（Random Sample Consensus, RANSAC）算法，尽管该算法对对抗性离群值具有较强的鲁棒性，但会牺牲对高斯噪声和模型误设的鲁棒性以及效率。为此，本文提出了一种两阶段算法RANSAC+，精准定位并修复了标准RANSAC的失效模式。该方法在理论上有证明的鲁棒性，能够处理高斯噪声和对抗性污染，达到接近最优的样本复杂度，并且无需预先知道子空间维度，同时比现有的RANSAC类方法更高效。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09648
作者: Guixian Chen,Jianhao Ma,Salar Fattahi
机构: University of Michigan (密歇根大学)
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation (stat.CO)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we study the problem of robust subspace recovery (RSR) in the presence of both strong adversarial corruptions and Gaussian noise. Specifically, given a limited number of noisy samples – some of which are tampered by an adaptive and strong adversary – we aim to recover a low-dimensional subspace that approximately contains a significant fraction of the uncorrupted samples, up to an error that scales with the Gaussian noise. Existing approaches to this problem often suffer from high computational costs or rely on restrictive distributional assumptions, limiting their applicability in truly adversarial settings. To address these challenges, we revisit the classical random sample consensus (RANSAC) algorithm, which offers strong robustness to adversarial outliers, but sacrifices efficiency and robustness against Gaussian noise and model misspecification in the process. We propose a two-stage algorithm, RANSAC+, that precisely pinpoints and remedies the failure modes of standard RANSAC. Our method is provably robust to both Gaussian and adversarial corruptions, achieves near-optimal sample complexity without requiring prior knowledge of the subspace dimension, and is more efficient than existing RANSAC-type methods.
zh

[CV-103] SegEarth-R1: Geospatial Pixel Reasoning via Large Language Model

【速读】：该论文旨在解决传统遥感工作流程难以处理复杂隐式查询的问题，这些查询需要在空间上下文、领域知识及隐式用户意图上进行推理。为应对这一挑战，论文引入了一项新任务——地理空间像素推理（geospatial pixel reasoning），允许隐式查询与推理，并生成目标区域的掩码。为此，作者构建并发布了首个大规模基准数据集EarthReason，包含5,434个手动标注图像掩码及超过30,000组隐式问答对。同时，提出SegEarth-R1，这是一种简单而有效的语言引导分割基线模型，集成了分层视觉编码器、用于指令解析的大语言模型(LLM)以及专为空间相关性设计的掩码生成器。SegEarth-R1的关键设计包括针对遥感领域的特定优化，如对超高清遥感图像的激进视觉令牌压缩、描述投影模块以融合语言与多尺度特征，以及直接查询描述嵌入的精简掩码预测管道。实验结果表明，SegEarth-R1在推理与指代分割任务上达到了当前最优性能，显著优于传统方法及基于LLM的分割方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09644
作者: Kaiyu Li,Zepeng Xin,Li Pang,Chao Pang,Yupeng Deng,Jing Yao,Guisong Xia,Deyu Meng,Zhi Wang,Xiangyong Cao
机构: Xi’an Jiaotong University (西安交通大学); Wuhan University (武汉大学); Chinese Academy of Sciences (中国科学院)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Remote sensing has become critical for understanding environmental dynamics, urban planning, and disaster management. However, traditional remote sensing workflows often rely on explicit segmentation or detection methods, which struggle to handle complex, implicit queries that require reasoning over spatial context, domain knowledge, and implicit user intent. Motivated by this, we introduce a new task, \ie, geospatial pixel reasoning, which allows implicit querying and reasoning and generates the mask of the target region. To advance this task, we construct and release the first large-scale benchmark dataset called EarthReason, which comprises 5,434 manually annotated image masks with over 30,000 implicit question-answer pairs. Moreover, we propose SegEarth-R1, a simple yet effective language-guided segmentation baseline that integrates a hierarchical visual encoder, a large language model (LLM) for instruction parsing, and a tailored mask generator for spatial correlation. The design of SegEarth-R1 incorporates domain-specific adaptations, including aggressive visual token compression to handle ultra-high-resolution remote sensing images, a description projection module to fuse language and multi-scale features, and a streamlined mask prediction pipeline that directly queries description embeddings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SegEarth-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance on both reasoning and referring segmentation tasks, significantly outperforming traditional and LLM-based segmentation methods. Our data and code will be released at this https URL.
zh

[CV-104] nyLLaVA-Video-R1: Towards Smaller LMMs for Video Reasoning

【速读】：该论文试图解决如何通过强化学习提升小规模多模态模型的推理能力，并探索其在通用问答数据集上的可解释性推理过程。论文的关键在于提出了一种基于TinyLLaVA-Video的小规模视频推理模型TinyLLaVA-Video-R1，该模型参数量不超过40亿（4B），通过在通用视频问答（Video-QA）数据集上应用强化学习，不仅显著提升了推理与思维能力，还表现出类似人类“顿悟”（“aha moments”）的特性。此外，论文分享了一系列实验结果，为未来小规模模型在视频推理领域的研究提供了实践指导。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09641
作者: Xingjian Zhang,Siwei Wen,Wenjun Wu,Lei Huang
机构: SKLCCSE, Institute of Artificial Intelligence, Beihang University (北航), Beijing, China; Beijing Advanced Innovation Center for Future Blockchain and Privacy Computing, Beihang University (北航); Hangzhou International Innovation Institute, Beihang University (北航), Hangzhou, China
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, improving the reasoning ability of large multimodal models (LMMs) through reinforcement learning has made great progress. However, most existing works are based on highly reasoning-intensive datasets such as mathematics and code, and researchers generally choose large-scale models as the foundation. We argue that exploring small-scale models’ reasoning capabilities remains valuable for researchers with limited computational resources. Moreover, enabling models to explain their reasoning processes on general question-answering datasets is equally meaningful. Therefore, we present the small-scale video reasoning model TinyLLaVA-Video-R1. Based on TinyLLaVA-Video, a traceably trained video understanding model with no more than 4B parameters, it not only demonstrates significantly improved reasoning and thinking capabilities after using reinforcement learning on general Video-QA datasets, but also exhibits the emergent characteristic of “aha moments”. Furthermore, we share a series of experimental findings, aiming to provide practical insights for future exploration of video reasoning (thinking) abilities in small-scale models. It is available at this https URL.
zh

[CV-105] Ges3ViG: Incorporating Pointing Gestures into Language-Based 3D Visual Grounding for Embodied Reference Understanding CVPR

【速读】：该论文旨在解决三维场景中结合语言描述与人体指向手势的 embodied reference understanding (3D-ERU) 的研究不足问题。尽管已有研究探索了基于纯语言的 3D grounding，但针对同时包含语言和指向手势的 3D-ERU 探索较为有限。为填补这一空白，论文提出了一种名为 Imputer 的数据增强框架，并利用其构建了一个新的基准数据集 ImputeRefer，通过将人体指向手势融入仅包含语言指令的现有 3D 场景数据集中。关键解决方案在于引入 Ges3ViG 模型，该模型在 3D-ERU 任务上的准确率相较于其他 3D-ERU 方法提升了约 30%，同时比纯语言基础的 3D grounding 模型提高了约 9%。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09623
作者: Atharv Mahesh Mane,Dulanga Weerakoon,Vigneshwaran Subbaraju,Sougata Sen,Sanjay E. Sarma,Archan Misra
机构: Stony Brook University (石溪大学), USA; BITS Pilani Goa campus (比卡内冈理工学院果阿校区), India; Singapore-MIT Alliance for Research and Technology Centre (SMART 中心), Singapore; IHPC, Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR), Singapore (新加坡科技研究局信息通信研究院); BITS Pilani Goa campus (比卡内冈理工学院果阿校区), India; APPCAIR, India; Massachusetts Institute of Technology (麻省理工学院), USA; Singapore Management University (新加坡管理大学), Singapore
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Multimedia (cs.MM)
备注: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:3-Dimensional Embodied Reference Understanding (3D-ERU) combines a language description and an accompanying pointing gesture to identify the most relevant target object in a 3D scene. Although prior work has explored pure language-based 3D grounding, there has been limited exploration of 3D-ERU, which also incorporates human pointing gestures. To address this gap, we introduce a data augmentation framework-Imputer, and use it to curate a new benchmark dataset-ImputeRefer for 3D-ERU, by incorporating human pointing gestures into existing 3D scene datasets that only contain language instructions. We also propose Ges3ViG, a novel model for 3D-ERU that achieves ~30% improvement in accuracy as compared to other 3D-ERU models and ~9% compared to other purely language-based 3D grounding models. Our code and dataset are available at this https URL.
zh

[CV-106] okenize Image Patches: Global Context Fusion for Effective Haze Removal in Large Images CVPR2025

【速读】：该论文旨在解决大尺寸高分辨率图像去雾任务中的两个主要挑战：一是全局上下文信息与局部细节特征难以有效平衡的问题；二是现有深度学习模型因GPU内存限制，在处理大尺寸图像时通常需要采用图像切片或下采样方法，而这会导致全局信息丢失或高频细节被丢弃。论文的关键解决方案是提出了一种名为DehazeXL的新方法，它能够有效地在主流GPU硬件上实现大尺寸图像的端到端建模，同时保持全局上下文信息和局部特征的平衡。此外，为了评估全局上下文在去雾性能中的利用效率，论文设计了一种特定于去雾任务的视觉归因方法，并构建了一个超高清去雾数据集（8KDehaze），包含10,000对8192 × 8192像素的清晰与有雾遥感图像，以支持模型训练和测试。实验结果表明，DehazeXL能够在仅使用21GB显存的情况下推断高达10240 × 10240像素的图像，达到了当前所有评估方法中的最佳性能。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09621
作者: Jiuchen Chen,Xinyu Yan,Qizhi Xu,Kaiqi Li
机构: Beijing Institute of Technology (北京理工大学)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Accepted by CVPR 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Global contextual information and local detail features are essential for haze removal tasks. Deep learning models perform well on small, low-resolution images, but they encounter difficulties with large, high-resolution ones due to GPU memory limitations. As a compromise, they often resort to image slicing or downsampling. The former diminishes global information, while the latter discards high-frequency details. To address these challenges, we propose DehazeXL, a haze removal method that effectively balances global context and local feature extraction, enabling end-to-end modeling of large images on mainstream GPU hardware. Additionally, to evaluate the efficiency of global context utilization in haze removal performance, we design a visual attribution method tailored to the characteristics of haze removal tasks. Finally, recognizing the lack of benchmark datasets for haze removal in large images, we have developed an ultra-high-resolution haze removal dataset (8KDehaze) to support model training and testing. It includes 10000 pairs of clear and hazy remote sensing images, each sized at 8192 \times 8192 pixels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DehazeXL can infer images up to 10240 \times 10240 pixels with only 21 GB of memory, achieving state-of-the-art results among all evaluated methods. The source code and experimental dataset are available at this https URL.
zh

[CV-107] ERL-MPP: Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning with Multi-head Puzzle Perception for Solving Large-scale Jigsaw Puzzles of Eroded Gaps

【速读】：该论文旨在解决大型拼图（具有较大缝隙）在图像理解和组合优化方面特有的挑战，特别是那些碎片间存在间隙的大规模拼图。为应对这些挑战，论文提出了一种结合多头拼图感知的进化强化学习框架（Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning with Multi-head Puzzle Perception, ERL-MPP）。该框架的关键在于设计了一个共享编码器的多头拼图感知网络（Multi-head Puzzle Perception Network, MPPN），其中多个拼图头全面感知局部组装状态，而判别头提供全局评估；同时，通过进化强化学习（Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning, EvoRL）代理高效探索大规模交换动作空间，该代理中的演员基于感知到的拼图状态推荐一组合适的交换动作，评论员使用估计的奖励和拼图状态更新演员，而与进化策略耦合的评估员则根据历史组装经验优化动作选择。这一方法在包含大缝隙的JPLEG-5数据集和大规模拼图的MIT数据集上得到了全面验证，并显著优于现有的所有先进模型。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09608
作者: Xingke Song,Xiaoying Yang,Chenglin Yao,Jianfeng Ren,Ruibin Bai,Xin Chen,Xudong Jiang
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 9 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Solving jigsaw puzzles has been extensively studied. While most existing models focus on solving either small-scale puzzles or puzzles with no gap between fragments, solving large-scale puzzles with gaps presents distinctive challenges in both image understanding and combinatorial optimization. To tackle these challenges, we propose a framework of Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning with Multi-head Puzzle Perception (ERL-MPP) to derive a better set of swapping actions for solving the puzzles. Specifically, to tackle the challenges of perceiving the puzzle with gaps, a Multi-head Puzzle Perception Network (MPPN) with a shared encoder is designed, where multiple puzzlet heads comprehensively perceive the local assembly status, and a discriminator head provides a global assessment of the puzzle. To explore the large swapping action space efficiently, an Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning (EvoRL) agent is designed, where an actor recommends a set of suitable swapping actions from a large action space based on the perceived puzzle status, a critic updates the actor using the estimated rewards and the puzzle status, and an evaluator coupled with evolutionary strategies evolves the actions aligning with the historical assembly experience. The proposed ERL-MPP is comprehensively evaluated on the JPLEG-5 dataset with large gaps and the MIT dataset with large-scale puzzles. It significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art models on both datasets.
zh

[CV-108] Early-Bird Diffusion: Investigating and Leverag ing Timestep-Aware Early-Bird Tickets in Diffusion Models for Efficient Training

【速读】：该论文旨在解决扩散模型（DMs）训练过程中计算资源需求高的问题，通过多次前向和后向传播在众多时间步内进行操作。为应对这一挑战，论文提出了一种名为EB-Diff-Train的新方法，这是一种与其他加速扩散模型训练技术正交的方法。其关键在于研究和利用早期鸟彩票（Early-Bird Tickets, EB），即在训练初期显现且能够保持高质量生成的稀疏子网络。论文首先验证了传统EB彩票在扩散模型中的存在性，使模型无需完全训练密集网络即可实现竞争性的生成质量；接着引入针对扩散模型优化的timestep-aware EB彩票概念，这些彩票根据相应时间步区域的重要性调整稀疏程度，在非关键区域允许高度稀疏以节省计算资源，而在关键区域保留必要的计算能力。基于此，开发了一种高效训练技术，该技术衍生出时间步感知的EB彩票，进行并行训练并在推理阶段组合用于图像生成。实验结果表明，所提方法不仅验证了传统和时间步感知EB彩票的存在，还证明了EB-Diff-Train方法的有效性，可在空间和时间上显著减少训练时间，相比未修剪的密集模型速度提升2.9倍到5.8倍，与标准的训练-剪枝-微调流程相比甚至可快至10.3倍，同时不牺牲生成质量。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09606
作者: Lexington Whalen,Zhenbang Du,Haoran You,Chaojian Li,Sixu Li,Yingyan(Celine)Lin
机构: Georgia Institute of Technology (乔治亚理工学院)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Training diffusion models (DMs) requires substantial computational resources due to multiple forward and backward passes across numerous timesteps, motivating research into efficient training techniques. In this paper, we propose EB-Diff-Train, a new efficient DM training approach that is orthogonal to other methods of accelerating DM training, by investigating and leveraging Early-Bird (EB) tickets – sparse subnetworks that manifest early in the training process and maintain high generation quality. We first investigate the existence of traditional EB tickets in DMs, enabling competitive generation quality without fully training a dense model. Then, we delve into the concept of diffusion-dedicated EB tickets, drawing on insights from varying importance of different timestep regions. These tickets adapt their sparsity levels according to the importance of corresponding timestep regions, allowing for aggressive sparsity during non-critical regions while conserving computational resources for crucial timestep regions. Building on this, we develop an efficient DM training technique that derives timestep-aware EB tickets, trains them in parallel, and combines them during inference for image generation. Extensive experiments validate the existence of both traditional and timestep-aware EB tickets, as well as the effectiveness of our proposed EB-Diff-Train method. This approach can significantly reduce training time both spatially and temporally – achieving 2.9 \times to 5.8 \times speedups over training unpruned dense models, and up to 10.3 \times faster training compared to standard train-prune-finetune pipelines – without compromising generative quality. Our code is available at this https URL. Comments: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2025 Subjects: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV) Cite as: arXiv:2504.09606 [cs.CV] (or arXiv:2504.09606v1 [cs.CV] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.09606 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration) Submission history From: Lexington Whalen [view email] [v1] Sun, 13 Apr 2025 14:53:18 UTC (4,997 KB) Full-text links: Access Paper: View a PDF of the paper titled Early-Bird Diffusion: Investigating and Leveraging Timestep-Aware Early-Bird Tickets in Diffusion Models for Efficient Training, by Lexington Whalen and 5 other authorsView PDFHTML (experimental)TeX SourceOther Formats view license Current browse context: cs.CV prev | next new | recent | 2025-04 Change to browse by: cs References Citations NASA ADSGoogle Scholar Semantic Scholar a export BibTeX citation Loading… BibTeX formatted citation loading… Data provided by: Bookmark checked=“checked”> Bibliographic Tools Bibliographic and Citation Tools Bibliographic Explorer Toggle Bibliographic Explorer (What is the Explorer?) zh

[CV-109] Mixture-of-Shape-Experts (MoSE): End-to-End Shape Dictionary Framework to Prompt SAM for Generalizable Medical Segmentation CVPR2025

【速读】：该论文致力于解决单域泛化（Single Domain Generalization, SDG）在医学图像分割中的挑战，特别是如何利用跨成像协议、扫描仪供应商和临床站点的一致语义形状先验来提升模型的泛化能力。现有基于字典学习的方法通常受限于有限的表示能力（当离线计算的形状元素较少时）或因字典规模增大而过拟合。此外，这些方法难以与大型基础模型（如Segment Anything Model, SAM）兼容。

论文的关键解决方案是提出了一种名为Mixture-of-Shape-Experts (MoSE) 的新框架，将混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts, MoE）的思想引入字典学习中，以高效捕获多样且鲁棒的形状先验。MoSE 将字典中的每个原子视为形状专家，每个专家专注于编码特定的语义形状信息。通过一个门控网络动态融合这些形状专家，形成鲁棒的形状图谱，并借助 SAM 编码引导稀疏激活以避免过拟合。进一步地，该形状图谱被作为提示提供给 SAM，通过双向集成充分利用 SAM 的强大泛化能力。所有模块（包括形状字典）均以端到端的方式进行训练。实验结果验证了该方法的有效性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09601
作者: Jia Wei,Xiaoqi Zhao,Jonghye Woo,Jinsong Ouyang,Georges El Fakhri,Qingyu Chen,Xiaofeng Liu
机构: Dept. of Radiology and Biomedical Imaging, Yale University (耶鲁大学), New Haven, USA; Dept. of Biomedical Informatics and Data Science, Yale University (耶鲁大学), New Haven, USA; Dept. of Radiology, Massachusetts General Hospital and Harvard Medical School (哈佛大学医学院), Boston, USA
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Multimedia (cs.MM); Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Medical Physics (physics.med-ph)
备注: Accepted to CVPR 2025 workshop

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Single domain generalization (SDG) has recently attracted growing attention in medical image segmentation. One promising strategy for SDG is to leverage consistent semantic shape priors across different imaging protocols, scanner vendors, and clinical sites. However, existing dictionary learning methods that encode shape priors often suffer from limited representational power with a small set of offline computed shape elements, or overfitting when the dictionary size grows. Moreover, they are not readily compatible with large foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM). In this paper, we propose a novel Mixture-of-Shape-Experts (MoSE) framework that seamlessly integrates the idea of mixture-of-experts (MoE) training into dictionary learning to efficiently capture diverse and robust shape priors. Our method conceptualizes each dictionary atom as a shape expert, which specializes in encoding distinct semantic shape information. A gating network dynamically fuses these shape experts into a robust shape map, with sparse activation guided by SAM encoding to prevent overfitting. We further provide this shape map as a prompt to SAM, utilizing the powerful generalization capability of SAM through bidirectional integration. All modules, including the shape dictionary, are trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate its effectiveness.
zh

[CV-110] DualPrompt-MedCap: A Dual-Prompt Enhanced Approach for Medical Image Captioning

【速读】：该论文旨在解决医学影像描述生成中上下文相关性和模态识别准确性不足的问题。现有方法在生成准确且与模态相关的描述时面临挑战，尤其是在缺乏高质量标注数据的情况下。论文的关键创新在于提出了一种名为DualPrompt-MedCap的双提示增强框架，通过两个专门组件实现对大规模视觉语言模型（Large Vision-Language Models, LVLMs）的增强：一是从预训练于医学问答对上的半监督分类模型中提取的模态感知提示（modality-aware prompt），二是利用生物医学语言模型嵌入构建的问题引导提示（question-guided prompt）。此外，为了弥补描述生成基准数据的不足，论文还设计了一个综合考虑空间语义相关性和医学叙述质量的评估框架。实验结果表明，DualPrompt-MedCap不仅将模态识别准确率提升了22%，还生成了更全面且与问题对齐的描述，从而为临床诊断提供支持，并可作为医学专家的先验知识或下游任务的自动标注来源。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09598
作者: Yining Zhao,Ali Braytee,Mukesh Prasad
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 11 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Medical image captioning via vision-language models has shown promising potential for clinical diagnosis assistance. However, generating contextually relevant descriptions with accurate modality recognition remains challenging. We present DualPrompt-MedCap, a novel dual-prompt enhancement framework that augments Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) through two specialized components: (1) a modality-aware prompt derived from a semi-supervised classification model pretrained on medical question-answer pairs, and (2) a question-guided prompt leveraging biomedical language model embeddings. To address the lack of captioning ground truth, we also propose an evaluation framework that jointly considers spatial-semantic relevance and medical narrative quality. Experiments on multiple medical datasets demonstrate that DualPrompt-MedCap outperforms the baseline BLIP-3 by achieving a 22% improvement in modality recognition accuracy while generating more comprehensive and question-aligned descriptions. Our method enables the generation of clinically accurate reports that can serve as medical experts’ prior knowledge and automatic annotations for downstream vision-language tasks.
zh

[CV-111] xtSplat: Text-Guided Semantic Fusion for Generalizable Gaussian Splatting

【速读】：该论文旨在解决现有通用高斯点 splatting 方法在复杂场景中重建精细细节时忽视文本驱动引导以增强语义理解的问题。尽管许多方法强调了几何一致性，但它们未能充分利用文本提示来提升语义信息的准确性。为了解决这一局限性，论文提出了一种名为 TextSplat 的首个文本驱动的通用高斯点 splatting 框架。其关键在于通过融合多样的语义线索，学习稳健的跨模态特征表示，以改善几何与语义信息的对齐，从而实现高保真的三维重建。具体而言，该框架采用三个并行模块获取互补表征：扩散先验深度估计器用于精确深度信息，语义感知分割网络用于详细语义信息，以及多视角交互网络用于精化跨视图特征。最终，在文本引导语义融合模块中，这些表征通过基于文本和注意力的特征聚合机制整合，生成富含详细语义线索的增强三维高斯参数。实验结果表明，该框架在多个基准数据集上的性能优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09588
作者: Zhicong Wu,Hongbin Xu,Gang Xu,Ping Nie,Zhixin Yan,Jinkai Zheng,Liangqiong Qu,Ming Li,Liqiang Nie
机构: Institute of Artificial Intelligence, Xiamen University (厦门大学人工智能研究院); School of Automation Science and Engineering, South China University of Technology (华南理工大学自动化科学与工程学院); Guangdong Laboratory of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Economy (SZ) (广东省人工智能与数字经济实验室（深圳）); Peking University (北京大学); School of Future Technology, South China University of Technology (华南理工大学未来技术学院); College of communication Engineering, Hangzhou Dianzi University (杭州电子科技大学通信工程学院); University of Hong Kong (香港大学); Ming Li, Guangdong Laboratory of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Economy (SZ) (广东省人工智能与数字经济实验室（深圳）); Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) (哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）);
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent advancements in Generalizable Gaussian Splatting have enabled robust 3D reconstruction from sparse input views by utilizing feed-forward Gaussian Splatting models, achieving superior cross-scene generalization. However, while many methods focus on geometric consistency, they often neglect the potential of text-driven guidance to enhance semantic understanding, which is crucial for accurately reconstructing fine-grained details in complex scenes. To address this limitation, we propose TextSplat–the first text-driven Generalizable Gaussian Splatting framework. By employing a text-guided fusion of diverse semantic cues, our framework learns robust cross-modal feature representations that improve the alignment of geometric and semantic information, producing high-fidelity 3D reconstructions. Specifically, our framework employs three parallel modules to obtain complementary representations: the Diffusion Prior Depth Estimator for accurate depth information, the Semantic Aware Segmentation Network for detailed semantic information, and the Multi-View Interaction Network for refined cross-view features. Then, in the Text-Guided Semantic Fusion Module, these representations are integrated via the text-guided and attention-based feature aggregation mechanism, resulting in enhanced 3D Gaussian parameters enriched with detailed semantic cues. Experimental results on various benchmark datasets demonstrate improved performance compared to existing methods across multiple evaluation metrics, validating the effectiveness of our framework. The code will be publicly available.
zh

[CV-112] Mitigating Long-tail Distribution in Oracle Bone Inscriptions: Dataset Model and Benchmark

【速读】：该论文旨在解决甲骨文（OBI）识别领域中现有数据集长尾分布问题导致模型在多数类与少数类上的性能偏差，以及缺乏大规模结构对齐图像对以支持生成模型训练的问题。论文的关键解决方案包括：首先构建了一个名为Oracle-P15K的结构对齐甲骨文数据集，包含14,542幅融合甲骨文专家领域知识的图像；其次提出了一种基于扩散模型的伪甲骨文生成器OBIDiff，能够实现真实且可控的甲骨文生成，在保持甲骨文字形结构的同时有效转移拓片风格。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09555
作者: Jinhao Li,Zijian Chen,Runze Dong,Tingzhu Chen,Changbo Wang,Guangtao Zhai
机构: East China Normal University (华东师范大学); Shanghai Jiao Tong University (上海交通大学)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The oracle bone inscription (OBI) recognition plays a significant role in understanding the history and culture of ancient China. However, the existing OBI datasets suffer from a long-tail distribution problem, leading to biased performance of OBI recognition models across majority and minority classes. With recent advancements in generative models, OBI synthesis-based data augmentation has become a promising avenue to expand the sample size of minority classes.
