By embedding the given motion into quantized tokens with a novel distribution regularization method, MotionDreamer constructs a robust and informative codebook for local motion patterns. Moreover, a sliding window local attention is introduced in our masked transformer, enabling the generation of natural yet diverse animations that closely resemble the reference motion patterns. As demonstrated through comprehensive experiments, MotionDreamer outperforms the state-of-the-art methods that are typically GAN or Diffusion-based in both faithfulness and diversity. Thanks to the consistency and robustness of the quantization-based approach, MotionDreamer can also effectively perform downstream tasks such as temporal motion editing, \textcolorupdatecrowd animation, and beat-aligned dance generation, all using a single reference motion. Visit our project page: this https URL
zh

[CV-186] Rethinking Few-Shot Fusion: Granular Ball Priors Enable General-Purpose Deep Image Fusion

【速读】：该论文旨在解决图像融合任务中因缺乏真实的融合图像作为先验信息，导致大多数基于深度学习的方法需要大规模数据对来提取全局权重特征以逼近真实融合图像的问题。论文的关键创新在于利用Granular Ball适应方法从亮度空间提取特征作为深度网络的先验信息，从而实现融合网络快速收敛完成融合任务。具体而言，通过将原始融合图像中像素对的信息表达划分为正域（表现显著的像素对）和边界域（非显著像素对），并在亮度空间进行分割推理以计算不同程度表达信息的像素权重，生成提供结构化亮度空间先验的近似监督图像；同时，提取的全局显著性特征还自适应地为网络中各模态图像的损失函数权重设置提供先验，引导网络在全局和像素级别快速收敛。这种方案使得每个模态仅需使用10对图像作为训练集即可完成融合任务，并在少量迭代内实现高效融合。实验验证了算法的有效性和理论正确性，与最先进的方法相比，该方法在融合时间和图像表达力方面表现出高度竞争力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08937
作者: Minjie Deng,Yan Wei,Hao Zhai,An Wu,Yuncan Ouyang,Qianyao Peng
机构: 未知
类目: Graphics (cs.GR); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In image fusion tasks, due to the lack of real fused images as priors, most deep learning-based fusion methods obtain global weight features from original images in large-scale data pairs to generate images that approximate real fused images. However, unlike previous studies, this paper utilizes Granular Ball adaptation to extract features in the brightness space as priors for deep networks, enabling the fusion network to converge quickly and complete the fusion task. This leads to few-shot training for a general image fusion network, and based on this, we propose the GBFF fusion method. According to the information expression division of pixel pairs in the original fused image, we classify pixel pairs with significant performance as the positive domain and non-significant pixel pairs as the boundary domain. We perform split inference in the brightness space using Granular Ball adaptation to compute weights for pixels that express information to varying degrees, generating approximate supervision images that provide priors for the neural network in the structural brightness space. Additionally, the extracted global saliency features also adaptively provide priors for setting the loss function weights of each image in the network, guiding the network to converge quickly at both global and pixel levels alongside the supervised images, thereby enhancing the expressiveness of the fused images. Each modality only used 10 pairs of images as the training set, completing the fusion task with a limited number of iterations. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the algorithm and theory, and qualitative and quantitative comparisons with SOTA methods show that this approach is highly competitive in terms of fusion time and image expressiveness.
zh

[CV-187] Parameter-Free Fine-tuning via Redundancy Elimination for Vision Foundation Models

【速读】：该论文旨在解决视觉基础模型（Vision Foundation Models, VFMs）中存在的显著特征冗余问题，这种冗余可能限制其在新任务中的适应性。论文以Segment Anything Model (SAM)为例，研究了其内部的特征冗余，并提出了一种无参微调方法来应对这一挑战。解决方案的关键在于引入一种基于模型输出差异的通道选择算法，通过识别冗余与有效的通道，选择性地替换冗余通道以增强更有用的特征表示。这种方法强调对预训练特征的筛选、重用和增强，而非直接调整参数，从而提升特定任务的特征表达能力，同时降低计算开销和GPU内存占用。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08915
作者: Jiahuan Long,Tingsong Jiang,Wen Yao,Yizhe Xiong,Zhengqin Xu,Shuai Jia,Chao Ma
机构: Shanghai Jiao Tong University (上海交通大学); Tsinghua University (清华大学); Chinese Academy of Military Science (中国人民解放军军事科学院)
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Vision foundation models (VFMs) are large pre-trained models that form the backbone of various vision tasks. Fine-tuning VFMs can further unlock their potential for downstream tasks or scenarios. However, VFMs often contain significant feature redundancy, which may limit their adaptability to new tasks. In this paper, we investigate the redundancies in the segment anything model (SAM) and then propose a parameter-free fine-tuning method to address this issue. Unlike traditional fine-tuning methods that adjust parameters, our method emphasizes selecting, reusing, and enhancing pre-trained features, offering a new perspective on model fine-tuning. Specifically, we introduce a channel selection algorithm based on the model’s output difference to identify redundant and effective channels. By selectively replacing the redundant channels with more effective ones, we filter out less useful features and reuse the more relevant features to downstream tasks, thereby enhancing the task-specific feature representation. Experiments on both out-of-domain and in-domain datasets demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our method. Notably, our approach can seamlessly integrate with existing fine-tuning strategies (e.g., LoRA, Adapter), further boosting the performance of already fine-tuned models. Moreover, since our channel selection involves only model inference, our method significantly reduces computational and GPU memory overhead.
zh

[CV-188] Hybrid AI-Physical Modeling for Penetration Bias Correction in X-band InSAR DEMs: A Greenland Case Study

【速读】：该论文旨在解决由干涉合成孔径雷达（Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar, InSAR）数据生成的数字高程模型（Digital Elevation Model, DEM）在冰川和积雪覆盖区域中存在的系统性高程误差问题，即所谓的“穿透偏差（penetration bias）”。论文的关键解决方案在于提出了一种集成校正框架，将基于物理参数的建模与机器学习相结合。通过在三种不同采集参数定义的训练场景下评估该方法，并利用TanDEM-X数据对格陵兰冰盖进行实验，结果显示，该混合模型显著降低了DEM误差的均值和标准差，同时相较于纯物理建模和纯机器学习方法，表现出更好的泛化能力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08909
作者: Islam Mansour,Georg Fischer,Ronny Haensch,Irena Hajnsek
机构: Microwaves and Radar Institute, German Aerospace Center DLR (德国航空航天中心微波与雷达研究所); Institute of Environmental Engineering, ETH Zurich (瑞士苏黎世联邦理工学院环境工程研究所)
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 8 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Digital elevation models derived from Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) data over glacial and snow-covered regions often exhibit systematic elevation errors, commonly termed “penetration bias.” We leverage existing physics-based models and propose an integrated correction framework that combines parametric physical modeling with machine learning. We evaluate the approach across three distinct training scenarios - each defined by a different set of acquisition parameters - to assess overall performance and the model’s ability to generalize. Our experiments on Greenland’s ice sheet using TanDEM-X data show that the proposed hybrid model corrections significantly reduce the mean and standard deviation of DEM errors compared to a purely physical modeling baseline. The hybrid framework also achieves significantly improved generalization than a pure ML approach when trained on data with limited diversity in acquisition parameters.
zh

[CV-189] Robust SAM: On the Adversarial Robustness of Vision Foundation Models AAAI2025

【速读】：该论文旨在解决Segment Anything Model (SAM) 在实际部署中对抗性攻击鲁棒性不足的问题，并填补现有研究在评估方法及防御策略上的空白。论文的关键在于提出了一种对抗鲁棒性框架，包含两个主要创新：首先，引入跨提示（cross-prompt）攻击方法以增强攻击在不同提示类型之间的迁移能力；其次，设计了一种少量参数适配策略，通过仅调整奇异值来约束可训练参数空间，从而在提升模型鲁棒性的同时最小化对原始精度的影响。实验表明，该方法不仅显著提高了攻击成功率，还通过仅适配512个参数实现了至少15%的平均交并比（mIoU）提升，并在保持SAM原有性能的前提下增强了其鲁棒性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08906
作者: Jiahuan Long,Zhengqin Xu,Tingsong Jiang,Wen Yao,Shuai Jia,Chao Ma,Xiaoqian Chen
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Accepted by AAAI2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The Segment Anything Model (SAM) is a widely used vision foundation model with diverse applications, including image segmentation, detection, and tracking. Given SAM’s wide applications, understanding its robustness against adversarial attacks is crucial for real-world deployment. However, research on SAM’s robustness is still in its early stages. Existing attacks often overlook the role of prompts in evaluating SAM’s robustness, and there has been insufficient exploration of defense methods to balance the robustness and accuracy. To address these gaps, this paper proposes an adversarial robustness framework designed to evaluate and enhance the robustness of SAM. Specifically, we introduce a cross-prompt attack method to enhance the attack transferability across different prompt types. Besides attacking, we propose a few-parameter adaptation strategy to defend SAM against various adversarial attacks. To balance robustness and accuracy, we use the singular value decomposition (SVD) to constrain the space of trainable parameters, where only singular values are adaptable. Experiments demonstrate that our cross-prompt attack method outperforms previous approaches in terms of attack success rate on both SAM and SAM 2. By adapting only 512 parameters, we achieve at least a 15% improvement in mean intersection over union (mIoU) against various adversarial attacks. Compared to previous defense methods, our approach enhances the robustness of SAM while maximally maintaining its original performance.
zh

[CV-190] LookingGlass: Generative Anamorphoses via Laplacian Pyramid Warping CVPR2025

【速读】：该论文旨在解决传统变形图像（Anamorphosis）在直接观看时无法被正常解读的问题，提出一种方法以生成在保持可直接理解的同时仍具有视觉错觉效果的图像。论文的关键在于引入了一种名为Laplacian Pyramid Warping的频率感知图像扭曲技术，该技术结合潜在空间中的矩化流模型（latent rectified flow models），实现了对更广泛空间变换的支持，从而生成高质量的新型生成式视觉错觉图像。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08902
作者: Pascal Chang,Sergio Sancho,Jingwei Tang,Markus Gross,Vinicius C. Azevedo
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Accepted at CVPR 2025 (Oral)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Anamorphosis refers to a category of images that are intentionally distorted, making them unrecognizable when viewed directly. Their true form only reveals itself when seen from a specific viewpoint, which can be through some catadioptric device like a mirror or a lens. While the construction of these mathematical devices can be traced back to as early as the 17th century, they are only interpretable when viewed from a specific vantage point and tend to lose meaning when seen normally. In this paper, we revisit these famous optical illusions with a generative twist. With the help of latent rectified flow models, we propose a method to create anamorphic images that still retain a valid interpretation when viewed directly. To this end, we introduce Laplacian Pyramid Warping, a frequency-aware image warping technique key to generating high-quality visuals. Our work extends Visual Anagrams (arXiv:2311.17919) to latent space models and to a wider range of spatial transforms, enabling the creation of novel generative perceptual illusions.
zh

[CV-191] HAL-NeRF: High Accuracy Localization Leverag ing Neural Radiance Fields

【速读】：该论文旨在解决单目相机重定位（monocular camera relocalization）在大型室内外环境中的高精度定位问题，尤其是在仅使用图像作为输入的情况下，传统方法如绝对位姿回归（Absolute Pose Regression, APR）难以实现亚米级精度的问题。论文的关键在于提出了一种名为HAL-NeRF的方法，该方法结合了卷积神经网络（CNN）位姿回归器与基于蒙特卡洛粒子滤波器（Monte Carlo Particle Filter）的精化模块，并利用Nerfacto模型生成高质量的新视角图像以增强训练数据和计算光度损失。通过这种方式，HAL-NeRF显著提升了局部化的准确性，在7-Scenes和Cambridge Landmarks数据集上的平移误差分别达到了0.025m和0.04m，旋转误差分别为0.59°和0.58°，展示了将APR与基于NeRF的精化技术相结合以提高单目相机重定位精度的巨大潜力。然而，这一改进伴随着更高的计算开销。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08901
作者: Asterios Reppas,Grigorios-Aris Cheimariotis,Panos K. Papadopoulos,Panagiotis Frasiolas,Dimitrios Zarpalas
机构: 未知
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 8 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Precise camera localization is a critical task in XR applications and robotics. Using only the camera captures as input to a system is an inexpensive option that enables localization in large indoor and outdoor environments, but it presents challenges in achieving high accuracy. Specifically, camera relocalization methods, such as Absolute Pose Regression (APR), can localize cameras with a median translation error of more than 0.5m in outdoor scenes. This paper presents HAL-NeRF, a high-accuracy localization method that combines a CNN pose regressor with a refinement module based on a Monte Carlo particle filter. The Nerfacto model, an implementation of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), is used to augment the data for training the pose regressor and to measure photometric loss in the particle filter refinement module. HAL-NeRF leverages Nerfacto’s ability to synthesize high-quality novel views, significantly improving the performance of the localization pipeline. HAL-NeRF achieves state-of-the-art results that are conventionally measured as the average of the median per scene errors. The translation error was 0.025m and the rotation error was 0.59 degrees and 0.04m and 0.58 degrees on the 7-Scenes dataset and Cambridge Landmarks datasets respectively, with the trade-off of increased computational time. This work highlights the potential of combining APR with NeRF-based refinement techniques to advance monocular camera relocalization accuracy.
zh

[CV-192] ColonScopeX: Leverag ing Explainable Expert Systems with Multimodal Data for Improved Early Diagnosis of Colorectal Cancer AAAI-25

【速读】：该论文旨在解决结直肠癌（Colorectal Cancer, CRC）早期检测困难的问题，其核心挑战在于CRC症状缺乏特异性且常令人尴尬，导致患者往往忽视或不愿向临床医生报告，从而延误诊断。早期诊断的延迟显著影响患者的生存率，从I期的80-95%骤降至IV期的10%，而英国仅有14.4%的病例在I期被确诊。为应对这一挑战，论文提出ColonScopeX，这是一种利用可解释人工智能（Explainable AI, XAI）方法的机器学习框架，旨在提升CRC及癌前病变的早期检测能力。方案的关键在于采用多模态模型，整合血液样本测量信号（经Savitzky-Golay算法平滑处理）与全面的患者元数据（如用药史、合并症、年龄、体重和BMI等），并通过XAI技术增强模型决策过程的透明性和可解释性，以提高预测结果的可信度和接受度，最终实现作为分诊工具或大众筛查工具的应用潜力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08824
作者: Natalia Sikora,Robert L. Manschke,Alethea M. Tang,Peter Dunstan,Dean A. Harris,Su Yang
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
备注: Published to AAAI-25 Bridge Program

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Colorectal cancer (CRC) ranks as the second leading cause of cancer-related deaths and the third most prevalent malignant tumour worldwide. Early detection of CRC remains problematic due to its non-specific and often embarrassing symptoms, which patients frequently overlook or hesitate to report to clinicians. Crucially, the stage at which CRC is diagnosed significantly impacts survivability, with a survival rate of 80-95% for Stage I and a stark decline to 10% for Stage IV. Unfortunately, in the UK, only 14.4% of cases are diagnosed at the earliest stage (Stage I). In this study, we propose ColonScopeX, a machine learning framework utilizing explainable AI (XAI) methodologies to enhance the early detection of CRC and pre-cancerous lesions. Our approach employs a multimodal model that integrates signals from blood sample measurements, processed using the Savitzky-Golay algorithm for fingerprint smoothing, alongside comprehensive patient metadata, including medication history, comorbidities, age, weight, and BMI. By leveraging XAI techniques, we aim to render the model’s decision-making process transparent and interpretable, thereby fostering greater trust and understanding in its predictions. The proposed framework could be utilised as a triage tool or a screening tool of the general population. This research highlights the potential of combining diverse patient data sources and explainable machine learning to tackle critical challenges in medical diagnostics. Comments: Published to AAAI-25 Bridge Program Subjects: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC) Cite as: arXiv:2504.08824 [cs.LG] (or arXiv:2504.08824v1 [cs.LG] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.08824 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration)
zh

[CV-193] FM-LoRA: Factorized Low-Rank Meta-Prompting for Continual Learning

【速读】：该论文旨在解决在连续任务中，如何利用预训练模型（如Transformer）适应具有不同预测类别标签和领域的新任务，并最终学习到一个在多样化任务中具有泛化能力的模型这一长期挑战。现有方法通常通过不断增加额外的学习结构（如低秩适配LoRA适配器或提示词）或保留先前样本特征来维持性能，但这种做法会导致参数持续增长和存储成本迅速上升，同时缺乏对任务相似性的感知，从而阻碍了模型在不干扰已有知识的情况下有效适应新任务的能力。为了解决这些问题，论文提出了一种名为FM-LoRA的新颖高效低秩适配方法，其关键在于结合动态秩选择器（Dynamic Rank Selector, DRS）和动态元提示（Dynamic Meta-Prompting, DMP），通过共享的关键低秩子空间来更有效地分配模型容量，避免连续参数扩展，从而缓解灾难性遗忘现象并在多样化的任务和领域中实现稳健的性能表现。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08823
作者: Xiaobing Yu,Jin Yang,Xiao Wu,Peijie Qiu,Xiaofeng Liu
机构: Dept. of Radiology, Washington University in St. Louis (华盛顿大学圣路易斯分校), USA; Dept. of Computer Vision, MBZUAI (Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence), Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates; Dept. of Radiology and Biomedical Imaging, Yale University (耶鲁大学), New Haven, USA; Dept. of Biomedical Informatics and Data Science, Yale University (耶鲁大学), New Haven, USA
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 8 Pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:How to adapt a pre-trained model continuously for sequential tasks with different prediction class labels and domains and finally learn a generalizable model across diverse tasks is a long-lasting challenge. Continual learning (CL) has emerged as a promising approach to leverage pre-trained models (e.g., Transformers) for sequential tasks. While many existing CL methods incrementally store additional learned structures, such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters or prompts and sometimes even preserve features from previous samples to maintain performance. This leads to unsustainable parameter growth and escalating storage costs as the number of tasks increases. Moreover, current approaches often lack task similarity awareness, which further hinders the models ability to effectively adapt to new tasks without interfering with previously acquired knowledge. To address these challenges, we propose FM-LoRA, a novel and efficient low-rank adaptation method that integrates both a dynamic rank selector (DRS) and dynamic meta-prompting (DMP). This framework allocates model capacity more effectively across tasks by leveraging a shared low-rank subspace critical for preserving knowledge, thereby avoiding continual parameter expansion. Extensive experiments on various CL benchmarks, including ImageNet-R, CIFAR100, and CUB200 for class-incremental learning (CIL), and DomainNet for domain-incremental learning (DIL), with Transformers backbone demonstrate that FM-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting while delivering robust performance across a diverse range of tasks and domains.
zh

[CV-194] Zero-shot Autonomous Microscopy for Scalable and Intelligent Characterization of 2D Materials

【速读】：该论文旨在解决传统原子尺度材料表征依赖人工专家且耗时长的问题，特别是在处理新型二维（2D）结构材料时，准确可靠的表征仍具挑战性。为此，论文提出了一种端到端框架ATOMIC（自主光学显微镜智能表征），通过集成基础模型实现2D材料的完全自主零样本表征。解决方案的关键在于结合视觉基础模型（如Segment Anything Model）、大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）、无监督聚类和拓扑分析，并通过提示工程自动化显微镜控制、样品扫描、图像分割及智能分析，无需额外训练数据即可完成任务。实验表明，该方法在单层识别中的分割准确率达到99.7%，与人类专家相当，并能检测肉眼难以识别的晶界裂隙，同时在不同条件下保持高精度，适用于多种常见2D材料。这一工作展示了如何利用基础模型实现自主分析，建立了一种可扩展且高效的数据利用表征范式，从根本上变革了纳米尺度材料研究的方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10281
作者: Jingyun Yang,Ruoyan Avery Yin,Chi Jiang,Yuepeng Hu,Xiaokai Zhu,Xingjian Hu,Sutharsika Kumar,Xiao Wang,Xiaohua Zhai,Keran Rong,Yunyue Zhu,Tianyi Zhang,Zongyou Yin,Jing Kong,Neil Zhenqiang Gong,Zhichu Ren,Haozhe Wang
机构: 未知
类目: Materials Science (cond-mat.mtrl-sci); Mesoscale and Nanoscale Physics (cond-mat.mes-hall); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 13 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Characterization of atomic-scale materials traditionally requires human experts with months to years of specialized training. Even for trained human operators, accurate and reliable characterization remains challenging when examining newly discovered materials such as two-dimensional (2D) structures. This bottleneck drives demand for fully autonomous experimentation systems capable of comprehending research objectives without requiring large training datasets. In this work, we present ATOMIC (Autonomous Technology for Optical Microscopy Intelligent Characterization), an end-to-end framework that integrates foundation models to enable fully autonomous, zero-shot characterization of 2D materials. Our system integrates the vision foundation model (i.e., Segment Anything Model), large language models (i.e., ChatGPT), unsupervised clustering, and topological analysis to automate microscope control, sample scanning, image segmentation, and intelligent analysis through prompt engineering, eliminating the need for additional training. When analyzing typical MoS2 samples, our approach achieves 99.7% segmentation accuracy for single layer identification, which is equivalent to that of human experts. In addition, the integrated model is able to detect grain boundary slits that are challenging to identify with human eyes. Furthermore, the system retains robust accuracy despite variable conditions including defocus, color temperature fluctuations, and exposure variations. It is applicable to a broad spectrum of common 2D materials-including graphene, MoS2, WSe2, SnSe-regardless of whether they were fabricated via chemical vapor deposition or mechanical exfoliation. This work represents the implementation of foundation models to achieve autonomous analysis, establishing a scalable and data-efficient characterization paradigm that fundamentally transforms the approach to nanoscale materials research.
zh

[CV-195] owards contrast- and pathology-agnostic clinical fetal brain MRI segmentation using SynthSeg

【速读】：该论文致力于解决胎儿脑部磁共振成像（MRI）自动分割中因领域偏移（domain shift）导致的性能下降问题，特别是在生理差异和成像环境变化显著的情况下，以及病理情况下常见的形状差异。论文的关键在于提出了一种新颖的数据驱动训练时采样策略，旨在充分利用训练数据集的多样性以增强模型的领域泛化能力。此外，通过将此采样器与SynthSeg框架结合，并结合其他现有数据增强技术，验证了所提方法的有效性。实验结果表明，该方法在具有强烈解剖异常的测试样本上显著提升了分割质量（p < 1e-4），尽管在异常较少的情况下性能略有下降。这项工作也为未来开发适用于其他训练流程的数据驱动采样策略奠定了基础。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10244
作者: Ziyao Shang,Misha Kaandorp,Kelly Payette,Marina Fernandez Garcia,Roxane Licandro,Georg Langs,Jordina Aviles Verdera,Jana Hutter,Bjoern Menze,Gregor Kasprian,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Andras Jakab
机构: 未知
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 21 pages, 16 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) has played a crucial role in fetal neurodevelopmental research. Structural annotations of MR images are an important step for quantitative analysis of the developing human brain, with Deep learning providing an automated alternative for this otherwise tedious manual process. However, segmentation performances of Convolutional Neural Networks often suffer from domain shift, where the network fails when applied to subjects that deviate from the distribution with which it is trained on. In this work, we aim to train networks capable of automatically segmenting fetal brain MRIs with a wide range of domain shifts pertaining to differences in subject physiology and acquisition environments, in particular shape-based differences commonly observed in pathological cases. We introduce a novel data-driven train-time sampling strategy that seeks to fully exploit the diversity of a given training dataset to enhance the domain generalizability of the trained networks. We adapted our sampler, together with other existing data augmentation techniques, to the SynthSeg framework, a generator that utilizes domain randomization to generate diverse training data, and ran thorough experimentations and ablation studies on a wide range of training/testing data to test the validity of the approaches. Our networks achieved notable improvements in the segmentation quality on testing subjects with intense anatomical abnormalities (p 1e-4), though at the cost of a slighter decrease in performance in cases with fewer abnormalities. Our work also lays the foundation for future works on creating and adapting data-driven sampling strategies for other training pipelines.
zh

[CV-196] Progressive Transfer Learning for Multi-Pass Fundus Image Restoration

【速读】：该论文旨在解决因低质量眼底图像（如光照不足、噪声、模糊及运动伪影等）导致的糖尿病性视网膜病变（Diabetic Retinopathy, DR）筛查准确性下降的问题。论文的关键解决方案是提出了一种渐进式迁移学习（Progressive Transfer Learning, PTL）的多阶段修复方法，通过迭代增强低质量眼底图像的质量，从而实现更可靠的DR筛查。与单一修复方法不同，PTL能够在无需配对数据的情况下实现盲修复，并通过逐步学习和微调策略，有效减少失真并保留关键的视网膜特征，同时显著提升图像的整体质量，甚至改善高质量图像的表现。实验结果表明，该方法在DeepDRiD数据集上的表现达到当前最优水平，验证了PTL在多阶段图像质量修复中的优越性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10025
作者: Uyen Phan,Ozer Can Devecioglu,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj
机构: 未知
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 13 pages, 12 figures including appendix

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Diabetic retinopathy is a leading cause of vision impairment, making its early diagnosis through fundus imaging critical for effective treatment planning. However, the presence of poor quality fundus images caused by factors such as inadequate illumination, noise, blurring and other motion artifacts yields a significant challenge for accurate DR screening. In this study, we propose progressive transfer learning for multi pass restoration to iteratively enhance the quality of degraded fundus images, ensuring more reliable DR screening. Unlike previous methods that often focus on a single pass restoration, multi pass restoration via PTL can achieve a superior blind restoration performance that can even improve most of the good quality fundus images in the dataset. Initially, a Cycle GAN model is trained to restore low quality images, followed by PTL induced restoration passes over the latest restored outputs to improve overall quality in each pass. The proposed method can learn blind restoration without requiring any paired data while surpassing its limitations by leveraging progressive learning and fine tuning strategies to minimize distortions and preserve critical retinal features. To evaluate PTL’s effectiveness on multi pass restoration, we conducted experiments on DeepDRiD, a large scale fundus imaging dataset specifically curated for diabetic retinopathy detection. Our result demonstrates state of the art performance, showcasing PTL’s potential as a superior approach to iterative image quality restoration.
zh

[CV-197] OmniMamba4D: Spatio-temporal Mamba for longitudinal CT lesion segmentation

【速读】：该论文试图解决现有3D分割模型仅关注空间信息的问题，特别是在纵向CT扫描中对肿瘤进展监测和治疗反应评估的需求。论文提出了一种名为OmniMamba4D的新框架，专注于处理4D医学图像（时间维度上的3D图像），以有效利用时空信息。其关键创新在于引入了时空四向Mamba块（spatio-temporal tetra-orientated Mamba block），能够同时捕捉空间和时间特征，与传统仅分析单一时点的3D模型不同，OmniMamba4D通过处理完整的4D CT数据提供病变进展的全面时空信息。实验结果显示，在包含3,252例CT扫描的数据集上，OmniMamba4D实现了Dice系数0.682，与最先进的模型相当，同时保持计算效率并更有效地检测消失的病灶。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09655
作者: Justin Namuk Kim,Yiqiao Liu,Rajath Soans,Keith Persson,Sarah Halek,Michal Tomaszewski,Jianda Yuan,Gregory Goldmacher,Antong Chen
机构: 未知
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Accepted at IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Accurate segmentation of longitudinal CT scans is important for monitoring tumor progression and evaluating treatment responses. However, existing 3D segmentation models solely focus on spatial information. To address this gap, we propose OmniMamba4D, a novel segmentation model designed for 4D medical images (3D images over time). OmniMamba4D utilizes a spatio-temporal tetra-orientated Mamba block to effectively capture both spatial and temporal features. Unlike traditional 3D models, which analyze single-time points, OmniMamba4D processes 4D CT data, providing comprehensive spatio-temporal information on lesion progression. Evaluated on an internal dataset comprising of 3,252 CT scans, OmniMamba4D achieves a competitive Dice score of 0.682, comparable to state-of-the-arts (SOTA) models, while maintaining computational efficiency and better detecting disappeared lesions. This work demonstrates a new framework to leverage spatio-temporal information for longitudinal CT lesion segmentation.
zh

[CV-198] Predicting ulcer in HE images of inflammatory bowel disease using domain-knowledge-driven graph neural network

【速读】：该论文旨在解决溃疡性结肠炎（IBD）病理切片图像中溃疡区域精准识别的问题，以支持免疫细胞特征分析及个性化治疗策略的开发。传统多重实例学习（MIL）方法虽已推进全片图像（WSI）分析，但缺乏空间上下文意识。论文的关键解决方案是提出一种名为DomainGCN的弱监督模型，通过图卷积神经网络（GCN）结合特定领域的溃疡特征知识（如上皮细胞、淋巴细胞和碎片的存在），实现WSI层面溃疡预测的性能提升。实验表明，DomainGCN在多种最先进的MIL方法中表现更优，并凸显了领域知识的重要性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09430
作者: Ruiwen Ding,Lin Li,Rajath Soans,Tosha Shah,Radha Krishnan,Marc Alexander Sze,Sasha Lukyanov,Yash Deshpande,Antong Chen
机构: University of California, Los Angeles (加州大学洛杉矶分校); Merck & Co., Inc. (默克公司)
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Work accepted at ISBI 2025

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) involves chronic inflammation of the digestive tract, with treatment options often burdened by adverse effects. Identifying biomarkers for personalized treatment is crucial. While immune cells play a key role in IBD, accurately identifying ulcer regions in whole slide images (WSIs) is essential for characterizing these cells and exploring potential therapeutics. Multiple instance learning (MIL) approaches have advanced WSI analysis but they lack spatial context awareness. In this work, we propose a weakly-supervised model called DomainGCN that employs a graph convolution neural network (GCN) and incorporates domain-specific knowledge of ulcer features, specifically, the presence of epithelium, lymphocytes, and debris for WSI-level ulcer prediction in IBD. We demonstrate that DomainGCN outperforms various state-of-the-art (SOTA) MIL methods and show the added value of domain knowledge.
zh

[CV-199] seg2med: a segmentation-based medical image generation framework using denoising diffusion probabilistic models

【速读】：该论文旨在解决医学影像合成领域中高质量合成图像生成及跨模态转换的问题。解决方案的关键在于提出了一种名为seg2med的先进框架，该框架利用去噪扩散概率模型（Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models, DDPM）从解剖学掩膜生成高保真的CT和MR合成图像。seg2med不仅实现了与真实患者图像相比结构相似性指数（SSIM）分别为0.94±0.02（CT）和0.89±0.04（MR）的合成效果，还通过Fréchet Inception距离（FID）3.62验证了生成质量，并且在跨模态转换任务中达到了MR-to-CT的SSIM值为0.91±0.03以及CT-to-MR的SSIM值为0.77±0.04。此外，借助TotalSegmentator工具包，seg2med展示了对多种数据集的支持能力，适用于临床成像、数据增强、多模态合成以及诊断算法开发等应用场景。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09182
作者: Zeyu Yang,Zhilin Chen,Yipeng Sun,Anika Strittmatter,Anish Raj,Ahmad Allababidi,Johann S. Rink,Frank G. Zöllner
机构: Computer Assisted Clinical Medicine, Medical Faculty Mannheim, Heidelberg University (海德堡大学), Mannheim, Germany; Pattern Recognition Lab, Friedrich-Alexander-University Erlangen-Nuremberg (埃尔朗根-纽伦堡弗里德里希亚历山大大学), Erlangen, Germany; Department of Radiology and Nuclear Medicine, University Medical Center Mannheim (曼海姆大学医学中心), Mannheim, Germany; Mannheim Institute for Intelligent Systems in Medicine, Medical Faculty Mannheim, Heidelberg University (海德堡大学), Mannheim, Germany
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 17 pages, 10 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this study, we present seg2med, an advanced medical image synthesis framework that uses Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM) to generate high-quality synthetic medical images conditioned on anatomical masks from TotalSegmentator. The framework synthesizes CT and MR images from segmentation masks derived from real patient data and XCAT digital phantoms, achieving a Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) of 0.94 +/- 0.02 for CT and 0.89 +/- 0.04 for MR images compared to ground-truth images of real patients. It also achieves a Feature Similarity Index Measure (FSIM) of 0.78 +/- 0.04 for CT images from XCAT. The generative quality is further supported by a Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of 3.62 for CT image generation. Additionally, seg2med can generate paired CT and MR images with consistent anatomical structures and convert images between CT and MR modalities, achieving SSIM values of 0.91 +/- 0.03 for MR-to-CT and 0.77 +/- 0.04 for CT-to-MR conversion. Despite the limitations of incomplete anatomical details in segmentation masks, the framework shows strong performance in cross-modality synthesis and multimodal imaging. seg2med also demonstrates high anatomical fidelity in CT synthesis, achieving a mean Dice coefficient greater than 0.90 for 11 abdominal organs and greater than 0.80 for 34 organs out of 59 in 58 test cases. The highest Dice of 0.96 +/- 0.01 was recorded for the right scapula. Leveraging the TotalSegmentator toolkit, seg2med enables segmentation mask generation across diverse datasets, supporting applications in clinical imaging, data augmentation, multimodal synthesis, and diagnostic algorithm development. Comments: 17 pages, 10 figures Subjects: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV) Cite as: arXiv:2504.09182 [eess.IV] (or arXiv:2504.09182v1 [eess.IV] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.09182 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration)
zh

[CV-200] Multi-Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation via 3D Multi-Scale Self-attention and Cross-attention

【速读】：该论文旨在解决现有基于CNN-Transformer混合架构的3D多模态医学图像分割模型在处理多尺度体积病灶特征时存在的固定感受野限制问题。解决方案的关键在于提出了一种名为TMA-TransBTS的新模型，该模型通过自注意力层中多尺度划分与聚合3D token的方式，实现了多尺度3D特征的同时提取与长距离依赖建模。此外，TMA-TransBTS还引入了一种3D多尺度交叉注意力模块，利用交叉注意力的互信息机制和多尺度聚合技术，在编码器与解码器之间建立联系，以提取丰富的体积表示。这些创新显著提升了3D多模态脑肿瘤分割任务的性能。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09088
作者: Yonghao Huang,Leiting Chen,Chuan Zhou
机构: Key Laboratory of Intelligent Digital Media Technology of Sichuan Province, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (电子科技大学); School of Computer Science and Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (电子科技大学); School of Information and Software Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (电子科技大学)
类目: Image and Video Processing (eess.IV); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Due to the success of CNN-based and Transformer-based models in various computer vision tasks, recent works study the applicability of CNN-Transformer hybrid architecture models in 3D multi-modality medical segmentation tasks. Introducing Transformer brings long-range dependent information modeling ability in 3D medical images to hybrid models via the self-attention mechanism. However, these models usually employ fixed receptive fields of 3D volumetric features within each self-attention layer, ignoring the multi-scale volumetric lesion features. To address this issue, we propose a CNN-Transformer hybrid 3D medical image segmentation model, named TMA-TransBTS, based on an encoder-decoder structure. TMA-TransBTS realizes simultaneous extraction of multi-scale 3D features and modeling of long-distance dependencies by multi-scale division and aggregation of 3D tokens in a self-attention layer. Furthermore, TMA-TransBTS proposes a 3D multi-scale cross-attention module to establish a link between the encoder and the decoder for extracting rich volume representations by exploiting the mutual attention mechanism of cross-attention and multi-scale aggregation of 3D tokens. Extensive experimental results on three public 3D medical segmentation datasets show that TMA-TransBTS achieves higher averaged segmentation results than previous state-of-the-art CNN-based 3D methods and CNN-Transform hybrid 3D methods for the segmentation of 3D multi-modality brain tumors.
zh

人工智能

[AI-0] Weight Ensembling Improves Reasoning in Language Models

【速读】：本文研究了在推理模型训练过程中出现的一种失效模式，即生成多样性崩溃导致测试时间扩展性能不佳的问题。具体而言，在有监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）过程中，Pass@1指标可靠提升，但Pass@k指标迅速恶化。为解决此问题，论文提出了一种简单干预方法——通过线性插值最新SFT检查点与早期检查点的权重（WiSE-FT），该方法几乎完全恢复了Pass@k性能，并同时提升了Pass@1。进一步通过强化学习微调后，WiSE-FT变体在测试时间扩展（如Best@k、多数投票）中表现更优，且使用更少数据即可达到更好的效果。此外，WiSE-FT提供了温度缩放等多样化解码策略无法单独实现的互补性能增益。论文从偏差-方差的角度形式化分析了Pass@k与Pass@1期望和方差之间的权衡关系，发现WiSE-FT能够同时降低偏差和方差，而温度缩放则固有地在这两者之间进行权衡。因此，关键在于通过WiSE-FT方法有效平衡生成多样性与性能优化之间的关系。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10478
作者: Xingyu Dang,Christina Baek,Kaiyue Wen,Zico Kolter,Aditi Raghunathan
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We investigate a failure mode that arises during the training of reasoning models, where the diversity of generations begins to collapse, leading to suboptimal test-time scaling. Notably, the Pass@1 rate reliably improves during supervised finetuning (SFT), but Pass@k rapidly deteriorates. Surprisingly, a simple intervention of interpolating the weights of the latest SFT checkpoint with an early checkpoint, otherwise known as WiSE-FT, almost completely recovers Pass@k while also improving Pass@1. The WiSE-FT variant achieves better test-time scaling (Best@k, majority vote) and achieves superior results with less data when tuned further by reinforcement learning. Finally, we find that WiSE-FT provides complementary performance gains that cannot be achieved only through diversity-inducing decoding strategies, like temperature scaling. We formalize a bias-variance tradeoff of Pass@k with respect to the expectation and variance of Pass@1 over the test distribution. We find that WiSE-FT can reduce bias and variance simultaneously, while temperature scaling inherently trades-off between bias and variance.
zh

[AI-1] AI-Driven Code Refactoring: Using Graph Neural Networks to Enhance Software Maintainability

【速读】：本文旨在解决通过自动化手段提升代码可维护性的问题，具体目标包括降低代码的圈复杂度（cyclomatic complexity）和耦合度（coupling）。论文提出利用图神经网络（Graph Neural Networks, GNNs）作为创新工具，基于抽象语法树（Abstract Syntax Trees, ASTs）进行代码重构。解决方案的关键在于将代码结构建模为图，并通过GNN学习节点间的关系以预测有效的重构操作，从而实现对代码质量的显著提升。实验结果表明，GNNs在准确性（92%）、复杂度降低（35%）和耦合度减少（33%）方面优于传统的SonarQube（分别为78%、16%）和决策树方法（分别为85%、25%），并且预处理阶段修复了60%的语法错误。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10412
作者: Gopichand Bandarupalli
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Software Engineering (cs.SE)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This study explores Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) as a transformative tool for code refactoring, using abstract syntax trees (ASTs) to boost software maintainability. It analyzes a dataset of 2 million snippets from CodeSearchNet and a custom 75000-file GitHub Python corpus, comparing GNNs against rule-based SonarQube and decision trees. Metrics include cyclomatic complexity (target below 10), coupling (target below 5), and refactoring precision. GNNs achieve 92% accuracy, reducing complexity by 35% and coupling by 33%, outperforming SonarQube (78%, 16%) and decision trees (85%, 25%). Preprocessing fixed 60% of syntax errors. Bar graphs, tables, and AST visuals clarify results. This offers a scalable AI-driven path to cleaner codebases, which is crucial for software engineering.
zh

[AI-2] Can LLM s Assist Expert Elicitation for Probabilistic Causal Modeling?

【速读】：该论文旨在探索大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）作为替代人工专家知识提取方法的可能性，以在生物计量学和医疗健康应用中提取结构化的因果知识并促进因果建模。论文的关键解决方案在于利用LLMs生成贝叶斯网络（Bayesian Networks, BNs），并通过与传统统计方法（如贝叶斯信息准则）在医疗数据集上的对比验证其性能。验证技术包括结构方程建模（Structural Equation Modeling, SEM）以确认关系，并通过熵值、预测准确性及鲁棒性等指标比较网络结构。结果显示，LLM生成的BNs在熵值上低于专家提取和统计生成的BNs，表明其预测具有更高的置信度和精度。然而，LLMs面临的上下文限制、幻觉依赖以及训练数据潜在偏差等问题仍需进一步研究。因此，该研究的核心贡献在于展示了LLMs在概率因果建模领域作为专家知识提取工具的潜力，有望提升模型决策的透明度并降低不确定性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10397
作者: Olha Shaposhnyk,Daria Zahorska,Svetlana Yanushkevich
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Objective: This study investigates the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) as an alternative to human expert elicitation for extracting structured causal knowledge and facilitating causal modeling in biometric and healthcare applications. Material and Methods: LLM-generated causal structures, specifically Bayesian networks (BNs), were benchmarked against traditional statistical methods (e.g., Bayesian Information Criterion) using healthcare datasets. Validation techniques included structural equation modeling (SEM) to verifying relationships, and measures such as entropy, predictive accuracy, and robustness to compare network structures. Results and Discussion: LLM-generated BNs demonstrated lower entropy than expert-elicited and statistically generated BNs, suggesting higher confidence and precision in predictions. However, limitations such as contextual constraints, hallucinated dependencies, and potential biases inherited from training data require further investigation. Conclusion: LLMs represent a novel frontier in expert elicitation for probabilistic causal modeling, promising to improve transparency and reduce uncertainty in the decision-making using such models. Subjects: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG) Cite as: arXiv:2504.10397 [cs.AI] (or arXiv:2504.10397v1 [cs.AI] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.10397 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration) Submission history From: Olha Shaposhnyk [view email] [v1] Mon, 14 Apr 2025 16:45:52 UTC (1,040 KB)
zh

[AI-3] acher Motion Priors: Enhancing Robot Locomotion over Challenging Terrain

【速读】：该论文致力于解决在复杂地形上实现鲁棒运动控制的挑战，主要难点在于高维控制和环境不确定性。论文提出了一种基于教师-学生范式的教师先验框架，通过整合模仿学习和辅助任务学习来提升学习效率和泛化能力。解决方案的关键在于解耦网络设计，简化策略网络与部署过程。具体而言，首先利用特权信息训练高性能的教师策略以获取可泛化的运动技能，然后通过生成对抗机制将教师的运动分布传递给仅依赖于嘈杂本体感觉数据的学生策略，从而缓解因分布偏移导致的性能退化。此外，辅助任务学习增强了学生策略的特征表示，加速了收敛并提升了对不同地形的适应性。该框架在类人机器人上的验证表明，其在动态地形上的运动稳定性显著提高，并大幅降低了开发成本。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10390
作者: Fangcheng Jin,Yuqi Wang,Peixin Ma,Guodong Yang,Pan Zhao,En Li,Zhengtao Zhang
机构: 未知
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 8 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Achieving robust locomotion on complex terrains remains a challenge due to high dimensional control and environmental uncertainties. This paper introduces a teacher prior framework based on the teacher student paradigm, integrating imitation and auxiliary task learning to improve learning efficiency and generalization. Unlike traditional paradigms that strongly rely on encoder-based state embeddings, our framework decouples the network design, simplifying the policy network and deployment. A high performance teacher policy is first trained using privileged information to acquire generalizable motion skills. The teacher’s motion distribution is transferred to the student policy, which relies only on noisy proprioceptive data, via a generative adversarial mechanism to mitigate performance degradation caused by distributional shifts. Additionally, auxiliary task learning enhances the student policy’s feature representation, speeding up convergence and improving adaptability to varying terrains. The framework is validated on a humanoid robot, showing a great improvement in locomotion stability on dynamic terrains and significant reductions in development costs. This work provides a practical solution for deploying robust locomotion strategies in humanoid robots.
zh

[AI-4] SymRTLO: Enhancing RTL Code Optimization with LLM s and Neuron-Inspired Symbolic Reasoning

【速读】：本文旨在解决在数字电路综合早期阶段通过优化寄存器传输级（RTL）代码提升功耗、性能和面积（PPA）的问题。传统手动重写方法虽能产生高质量结果，但耗时且易出错；而现有基于编译器的方法难以处理复杂的约束条件，而基于大型语言模型（LLM）的方法虽为替代方案，却常面临生成代码与提示对齐困难的问题。为此，论文提出SymRTLO，这是一种新颖的神经符号RTL优化框架，将基于LLM的代码重写与符号推理技术无缝集成。其关键创新在于引入基于检索增强生成（RAG）的优化规则系统和基于抽象语法树（AST）的模板，确保LLM生成的代码保持语法正确性的同时最小化不必要的电路行为。此外，通过设计用于分析和优化有限状态机（FSM）逻辑的符号模块，实现更细粒度的状态合并及部分规格处理，超越基于模式的编译器能力。同时，结合形式等价检查与测试驱动验证的快速验证管道进一步简化验证流程。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，SymRTLO分别提升了高达43.9%的功耗、62.5%的性能以及51.1%的面积效率。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10369
作者: Yiting Wang,Wanghao Ye,Ping Guo,Yexiao He,Ziyao Wang,Yexiao He,Bowei Tian,Shwai He,Guoheng Sun,Zheyu Shen,Sihan Chen,Ankur Srivastava,Qingfu Zhang,Gang Qu,Ang Li
机构: 未知
类目: Hardware Architecture (cs.AR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Programming Languages (cs.PL)
备注: 16 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables. Under Review

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Optimizing Register Transfer Level (RTL) code is crucial for improving the power, performance, and area (PPA) of digital circuits in the early stages of synthesis. Manual rewriting, guided by synthesis feedback, can yield high-quality results but is time-consuming and error-prone. Most existing compiler-based approaches have difficulty handling complex design constraints. Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods have emerged as a promising alternative to address these challenges. However, LLM-based approaches often face difficulties in ensuring alignment between the generated code and the provided prompts. This paper presents SymRTLO, a novel neuron-symbolic RTL optimization framework that seamlessly integrates LLM-based code rewriting with symbolic reasoning techniques. Our method incorporates a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system of optimization rules and Abstract Syntax Tree (AST)-based templates, enabling LLM-based rewriting that maintains syntactic correctness while minimizing undesired circuit behaviors. A symbolic module is proposed for analyzing and optimizing finite state machine (FSM) logic, allowing fine-grained state merging and partial specification handling beyond the scope of pattern-based compilers. Furthermore, a fast verification pipeline, combining formal equivalence checks with test-driven validation, further reduces the complexity of verification. Experiments on the RTL-Rewriter benchmark with Synopsys Design Compiler and Yosys show that SymRTLO improves power, performance, and area (PPA) by up to 43.9%, 62.5%, and 51.1%, respectively, compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
zh

[AI-5] Heimdall: test-time scaling on the generative verification

【速读】：该论文旨在解决长链路推理（long Chain-of-Thought reasoning）中大语言模型（LLMs）在验证能力上的不足问题。传统方法在复杂问题（如数学竞赛题）上的验证准确性仅为62.5%，而现有研究对此关注较少。为应对这一挑战，论文提出Heimdall，这是一种专门用于长链路推理验证的大语言模型，通过纯强化学习方法显著提升了验证准确性至94.5%，并通过重复采样进一步提升至97.5%。此外，Heimdall展现出强大的泛化能力，在未包含于训练集的数学证明任务中也能有效检测大部分问题。为扩展其应用范围，论文进一步提出Pessimistic Verification策略，通过Heimdall对解算器模型生成的解进行评估，并基于悲观原则选择最可能正确的解，从而优化解算过程。最终，该方案在AIME2025等任务中显著提高了解的准确性。解决方案的关键在于结合Heimdall的高精度验证能力和Pessimistic Verification的决策机制，同时构建了一个三元自动知识发现系统，实现问题生成、解答提供与验证的闭环流程，从而大幅提升问题求解的效率与可靠性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10337
作者: Wenlei Shi,Xing Jin
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:An AI system can create and maintain knowledge only to the extent that it can verify that knowledge itself. Recent work on long Chain-of-Thought reasoning has demonstrated great potential of LLMs on solving competitive problems, but their verification ability remains to be weak and not sufficiently investigated. In this paper, we propose Heimdall, the long CoT verification LLM that can accurately judge the correctness of solutions. With pure reinforcement learning, we boost the verification accuracy from 62.5% to 94.5% on competitive math problems. By scaling with repeated sampling, the accuracy further increases to 97.5%. Through human evaluation, Heimdall demonstrates impressive generalization capabilities, successfully detecting most issues in challenging math proofs, the type of which is not included during training. Furthermore, we propose Pessimistic Verification to extend the functionality of Heimdall to scaling up the problem solving. It calls Heimdall to judge the solutions from a solver model and based on the pessimistic principle, selects the most likely correct solution with the least uncertainty. Taking DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B as the solver model, Pessimistic Verification improves the solution accuracy on AIME2025 from 54.2% to 70.0% with 16x compute budget and to 83.3% with more compute budget. With the stronger solver Gemini 2.5 Pro, the score reaches 93.0%. Finally, we prototype an automatic knowledge discovery system, a ternary system where one poses questions, another provides solutions, and the third verifies the solutions. Using the data synthesis work NuminaMath for the first two components, Heimdall effectively identifies problematic records within the dataset and reveals that nearly half of the data is flawed, which interestingly aligns with the recent ablation studies from NuminaMath.
zh

[AI-6] AlayaDB: The Data Foundation for Efficient and Effective Long-context LLM Inference

【速读】：本文旨在解决大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）在推理过程中长上下文效率低下及资源消耗过大的问题。传统方法如KV缓存解聚合和基于检索的稀疏注意力机制虽有改进，但在硬件资源利用率和生成质量方面仍有不足。论文的关键创新在于将LLM推理中的注意力计算与缓存管理抽象为查询处理过程，并通过原生查询优化器提升性能。这种设计使得AlayaDB能够更高效地利用硬件资源，同时在不同服务级别目标（Service Level Objectives, SLOs）下提供高质量的生成结果。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10326
作者: Yangshen Deng,Zhengxin You,Long Xiang,Qilong Li,Peiqi Yuan,Zhaoyang Hong,Yitao Zheng,Wanting Li,Runzhong Li,Haotian Liu,Kyriakos Mouratidis,Man Lung Yiu,Huan Li,Qiaomu Shen,Rui Mao,Bo Tang
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Databases (cs.DB); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
备注: 14 pages, 12 figures, conference

点击查看摘要

Abstract:AlayaDB is a cutting-edge vector database system natively architected for efficient and effective long-context inference for Large Language Models (LLMs) at AlayaDB AI. Specifically, it decouples the KV cache and attention computation from the LLM inference systems, and encapsulates them into a novel vector database system. For the Model as a Service providers (MaaS), AlayaDB consumes fewer hardware resources and offers higher generation quality for various workloads with different kinds of Service Level Objectives (SLOs), when comparing with the existing alternative solutions (e.g., KV cache disaggregation, retrieval-based sparse attention). The crux of AlayaDB is that it abstracts the attention computation and cache management for LLM inference into a query processing procedure, and optimizes the performance via a native query optimizer. In this work, we demonstrate the effectiveness of AlayaDB via (i) three use cases from our industry partners, and (ii) extensive experimental results on LLM inference benchmarks.
zh

[AI-7] AutoStyle-TTS: Retrieval-Augmented Generation based Automatic Style Matching Text-to-Speech Synthesis ICME25

【速读】：该论文旨在解决语音合成领域中合成语音自然度与表现力不足的问题，特别是现有研究忽视了提示词（prompt）选择的重要性。论文的关键解决方案是提出了一种基于检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）技术的文本转语音（Text-to-Speech, TTS）框架，通过构建包含高质量语音样本的风格知识库以及开发一种基于嵌入向量匹配的风格适配方案来动态调整语音风格，以实现更自然且生动的通信效果。该方案利用由Llama、PER-LLM-Embedder和Moka提取的嵌入向量与知识库中的样本进行匹配，从而选择最合适的语音风格用于合成。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10309
作者: Dan Luo,Chengyuan Ma,Weiqin Li,Jun Wang,Wei Chen,Zhiyong Wu
机构: 未知
类目: ound (cs.SD); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: accepted by ICME25

点击查看摘要

Abstract:With the advancement of speech synthesis technology, users have higher expectations for the naturalness and expressiveness of synthesized speech. But previous research ignores the importance of prompt selection. This study proposes a text-to-speech (TTS) framework based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology, which can dynamically adjust the speech style according to the text content to achieve more natural and vivid communication effects. We have constructed a speech style knowledge database containing high-quality speech samples in various contexts and developed a style matching scheme. This scheme uses embeddings, extracted by Llama, PER-LLM-Embedder,and Moka, to match with samples in the knowledge database, selecting the most appropriate speech style for synthesis. Furthermore, our empirical research validates the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our demo can be viewed at: this https URL
zh

[AI-8] Characterizing LLM -driven Social Network: The Chirper.ai Case

【速读】：该论文试图解决大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）驱动的在线社交网络与人类驱动的在线社交网络之间的对比研究不足的问题。现有研究主要关注LLM代理在模拟网络中的集体行为模式和结构特性，但缺乏实证比较，限制了对LLM代理与人类用户差异的理解。论文的关键解决方案是构建了一个由超过65,000个LLM代理组成的大型社交网络平台，并收集了规模相当的人类驱动的Mastodon社交网络数据集，通过大规模分析比较两者在发帖行为、滥用内容及社交网络结构方面的差异，从而提供关于AI时代在线社交网络分析的深入洞见。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10286
作者: Yiming Zhu,Yupeng He,Ehsan-Ul Haq,Gareth Tyson,Pan Hui
机构: 未知
类目: ocial and Information Networks (cs.SI); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate the ability to simulate human decision-making processes, enabling their use as agents in modeling sophisticated social networks, both offline and online. Recent research has explored collective behavioral patterns and structural characteristics of LLM agents within simulated networks. However, empirical comparisons between LLM-driven and human-driven online social networks remain scarce, limiting our understanding of how LLM agents differ from human users. This paper presents a large-scale analysis of this http URL, an X/Twitter-like social network entirely populated by LLM agents, comprising over 65,000 agents and 7.7 million AI-generated posts. For comparison, we collect a parallel dataset from Mastodon, a human-driven decentralized social network, with over 117,000 users and 16 million posts. We examine key differences between LLM agents and humans in posting behaviors, abusive content, and social network structures. Our findings provide critical insights into the evolving landscape of online social network analysis in the AI era, offering a comprehensive profile of LLM agents in social simulations.
zh

[AI-9] Vision based driving agent for race car simulation environments

【速读】：该论文试图解决在模拟环境中实现接近专业人类水平的车辆操控以充分利用轮胎抓地力的问题。解决方案的关键在于采用深度强化学习（Deep Reinforcement Learning, DRL）方法，特别是利用近端策略优化（Proximal Policy Optimization, PPO）算法，通过仅使用视觉输入来训练智能体（agent），使其能够控制方向盘和踏板，从而达成时间最优驾驶任务，并实现类似于人类的学习与驾驶行为。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10266
作者: Gergely Bári,László Palkovics
机构: 未知
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Submitted to ICMCE 2024 ( this https URL )

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In recent years, autonomous driving has become a popular field of study. As control at tire grip limit is essential during emergency situations, algorithms developed for racecars are useful for road cars too. This paper examines the use of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to solve the problem of grip limit driving in a simulated environment. Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) method is used to train an agent to control the steering wheel and pedals of the vehicle, using only visual inputs to achieve professional human lap times. The paper outlines the formulation of the task of time optimal driving on a race track as a deep reinforcement learning problem, and explains the chosen observations, actions, and reward functions. The results demonstrate human-like learning and driving behavior that utilize maximum tire grip potential.
zh

[AI-10] Can Competition Enhance the Proficiency of Agents Powered by Large Language Models in the Realm of News-driven Time Series Forecasting?

【速读】：该论文旨在解决新闻驱动的多智能体时间序列预测任务中，衡量不同新闻事件对时间序列波动影响的挑战。具体而言，现有方法在优化智能体创新思维能力和识别误导性逻辑方面的能力有限。为应对这一问题，论文的关键解决方案在于引入竞争机制以增强智能体的创新能力，并在反思阶段嵌入经过微调的小规模语言模型（LLM）以提升其识别误导信息的能力。实验结果表明，竞争机制能够显著提高时间序列预测性能，同时竞争强度对智能体表现的影响为基于LLM的多智能体系统研究提供了新视角。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10210
作者: Yuxuan Zhang,Yangyang Feng,Daifeng Li,Kexin Zhang,Junlan Chen,Bowen Deng
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multi-agents-based news-driven time series forecasting is considered as a potential paradigm shift in the era of large language models (LLMs). The challenge of this task lies in measuring the influences of different news events towards the fluctuations of time series. This requires agents to possess stronger abilities of innovative thinking and the identifying misleading logic. However, the existing multi-agent discussion framework has limited enhancement on time series prediction in terms of optimizing these two capabilities. Inspired by the role of competition in fostering innovation, this study embeds a competition mechanism within the multi-agent discussion to enhance agents’ capability of generating innovative thoughts. Furthermore, to bolster the model’s proficiency in identifying misleading information, we incorporate a fine-tuned small-scale LLM model within the reflective stage, offering auxiliary decision-making support. Experimental results confirm that the competition can boost agents’ capacity for innovative thinking, which can significantly improve the performances of time series prediction. Similar to the findings of social science, the intensity of competition within this framework can influence the performances of agents, providing a new perspective for studying LLMs-based multi-agent systems.
zh

[AI-11] Efficient Generative Model Training via Embedded Representation Warmup

【速读】：该论文旨在解决扩散模型（Diffusion Models）在训练效率和表征质量方面相较于自监督方法（Self-Supervised Methods）存在的不足，其核心问题是扩散模型在训练过程中未能充分利用高质量、语义丰富的表征，导致收敛速度缓慢。论文的关键发现是，语义和结构模式的学习主要发生在早期层中的表征处理区域（Representation Processing Region），这是生成过程之前的重要阶段。为了解决这一问题，作者提出了嵌入表征预热（Embedded Representation Warmup, ERW）框架，其关键在于通过第一阶段的预热模块，利用预训练的高质量表征初始化扩散模型的早期层，从而减轻从零学习表征的负担，加速收敛并提升性能。理论分析表明，ERW的有效性依赖于其精确整合到特定神经网络层的能力，这些层即为表征处理区域。实验结果进一步证明，ERW不仅加速了训练收敛，还提升了表征质量，在训练速度上实现了比当前最先进的方法REPA快40倍的提升。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10188
作者: Deyuan Liu,Peng Sun,Xufeng Li,Tao Lin
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Diffusion models excel at generating high-dimensional data but fall short in training efficiency and representation quality compared to self-supervised methods. We identify a key bottleneck: the underutilization of high-quality, semantically rich representations during training notably slows down convergence. Our systematic analysis reveals a critical representation processing region – primarily in the early layers – where semantic and structural pattern learning takes place before generation can occur. To address this, we propose Embedded Representation Warmup (ERW), a plug-and-play framework where in the first stage we get the ERW module serves as a warmup that initializes the early layers of the diffusion model with high-quality, pretrained representations. This warmup minimizes the burden of learning representations from scratch, thereby accelerating convergence and boosting performance. Our theoretical analysis demonstrates that ERW’s efficacy depends on its precise integration into specific neural network layers – termed the representation processing region – where the model primarily processes and transforms feature representations for later generation. We further establish that ERW not only accelerates training convergence but also enhances representation quality: empirically, our method achieves a 40 \times acceleration in training speed compared to REPA, the current state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at this https URL.
zh

[AI-12] BoTTA: Benchmarking on-device Test Time Adaptation

【速读】：本文旨在解决深度学习模型在实际部署中因测试样本分布偏移而导致性能显著下降的问题。传统方法依赖于训练数据分布，而测试时适应（Test-Time Adaptation, TTA）通过在推理阶段动态调整模型以适应新环境，无需标记的测试数据或访问原始训练集。然而，现有研究较少关注移动和边缘设备上的特定约束。为此，论文提出BoTTA基准，专门评估TTA方法在这些资源受限设备上的表现。关键在于设计了一套针对四个实际挑战的评估框架：有限的测试样本、类别暴露限制、多样化的分布偏移以及样本内的重叠偏移。此外，与持续推理时适应不同，BoTTA提倡周期性适应以满足设备端需求。实验揭示了当前TTA算法在小数据集上的局限性及对未见类别泛化能力不足等问题，并提供了具体的资源使用数据。这为资源受限环境下的TTA应用提供了有价值的指导。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10149
作者: Michal Danilowski,Soumyajit Chatterjee,Abhirup Ghosh
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The performance of deep learning models depends heavily on test samples at runtime, and shifts from the training data distribution can significantly reduce accuracy. Test-time adaptation (TTA) addresses this by adapting models during inference without requiring labeled test data or access to the original training set. While research has explored TTA from various perspectives like algorithmic complexity, data and class distribution shifts, model architectures, and offline versus continuous learning, constraints specific to mobile and edge devices remain underexplored. We propose BoTTA, a benchmark designed to evaluate TTA methods under practical constraints on mobile and edge devices. Our evaluation targets four key challenges caused by limited resources and usage conditions: (i) limited test samples, (ii) limited exposure to categories, (iii) diverse distribution shifts, and (iv) overlapping shifts within a sample. We assess state-of-the-art TTA methods under these scenarios using benchmark datasets and report system-level metrics on a real testbed. Furthermore, unlike prior work, we align with on-device requirements by advocating periodic adaptation instead of continuous inference-time adaptation. Experiments reveal key insights: many recent TTA algorithms struggle with small datasets, fail to generalize to unseen categories, and depend on the diversity and complexity of distribution shifts. BoTTA also reports device-specific resource use. For example, while SHOT improves accuracy by 2.25\times with 512 adaptation samples, it uses 1.08\times peak memory on Raspberry Pi versus the base model. BoTTA offers actionable guidance for TTA in real-world, resource-constrained deployments.
zh

[AI-13] GeoUni: A Unified Model for Generating Geometry Diagrams Problems and Problem Solutions

【速读】：该论文试图解决几何推理任务中生成式模型无法同时处理问题求解与图示生成的问题，传统方法将这两者视为独立任务，而现有模型未能成功整合二者以支持个性化几何问题的创建。论文的关键解决方案在于提出GeoUni，一个统一的几何专家模型，通过单一框架实现问题求解与图示生成的无缝集成，从而能够创建独特且个性化的几何问题。实验表明，GeoUni仅需1.5B参数即可在几何推理任务中达到与DeepSeek-R1（671B参数）相当的性能，并在图示生成方面超越现有的文本到图像模型及统一模型，尤其在生成与特定知识点匹配的图文一致的几何问题方面表现出色。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10146
作者: Jo-Ku Cheng,Zeren Zhang,Ran Chen,Jingyang Deng,Ziran Qin,Jinwen Ma
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We propose GeoUni, the first unified geometry expert model capable of generating problem solutions and diagrams within a single framework in a way that enables the creation of unique and individualized geometry problems. Traditionally, solving geometry problems and generating diagrams have been treated as separate tasks in machine learning, with no models successfully integrating both to support problem creation. However, we believe that mastery in geometry requires frictionless integration of all of these skills, from solving problems to visualizing geometric relationships, and finally, crafting tailored problems. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that GeoUni, with only 1.5B parameters, achieves performance comparable to larger models such as DeepSeek-R1 with 671B parameters in geometric reasoning tasks. GeoUni also excels in generating precise geometric diagrams, surpassing both text-to-image models and unified models, including the GPT-4o image generation. Most importantly, GeoUni is the only model capable of successfully generating textual problems with matching diagrams based on specific knowledge points, thus offering a wider range of capabilities that extend beyond current models.
zh

[AI-14] Benchmarking Practices in LLM -driven Offensive Security: Testbeds Metrics and Experiment Design

【速读】：该论文旨在解决如何有效评估基于大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）驱动的攻击方法，并提出针对LLM在网络安全领域进攻性应用的评估体系改进方案。论文的关键在于强调现有测试环境的扩展、基准的建立以及综合度量指标与定性分析的重要性，同时指出CTF（Capture The Flag）类挑战可能无法充分反映真实世界渗透测试场景的需求。通过回顾16篇相关研究中的15个原型及其对应的测试平台，论文提供了具有实践意义的建议以指导未来的研究方向。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10112
作者: Andreas Happe,Jürgen Cito
机构: 未知
类目: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful approach for driving offensive penetration-testing tooling. This paper analyzes the methodology and benchmarking practices used for evaluating Large Language Model (LLM)-driven attacks, focusing on offensive uses of LLMs in cybersecurity. We review 16 research papers detailing 15 prototypes and their respective testbeds. We detail our findings and provide actionable recommendations for future research, emphasizing the importance of extending existing testbeds, creating baselines, and including comprehensive metrics and qualitative analysis. We also note the distinction between security research and practice, suggesting that CTF-based challenges may not fully represent real-world penetration testing scenarios. Subjects: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI) Cite as: arXiv:2504.10112 [cs.CR] (or arXiv:2504.10112v1 [cs.CR] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.10112 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration)
zh

[AI-15] Lightweight Trustworthy Distributed Clustering

【速读】：该论文旨在解决边缘计算系统（Edge Computing Systems, ECS）中单个边缘节点数据可信性保障与协作数据处理之间的矛盾，特别是在资源受限场景下（如自动驾驶传感器网络、工业物联网和智慧城市）。论文的关键解决方案在于提出了一种轻量级、完全分布式的k-means聚类算法，专为边缘环境设计。该算法在聚类中心更新阶段采用基于加法秘密共享的分布式平均方法，这是一种安全多方计算技术，以确保跨节点数据的准确性和可信性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10109
作者: Hongyang Li,Caesar Wu,Mohammed Chadli,Said Mammar,Pascal Bouvry
机构: 未知
类目: Distributed, Parallel, and Cluster Computing (cs.DC); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Ensuring data trustworthiness within individual edge nodes while facilitating collaborative data processing poses a critical challenge in edge computing systems (ECS), particularly in resource-constrained scenarios such as autonomous systems sensor networks, industrial IoT, and smart cities. This paper presents a lightweight, fully distributed k-means clustering algorithm specifically adapted for edge environments, leveraging a distributed averaging approach with additive secret sharing, a secure multiparty computation technique, during the cluster center update phase to ensure the accuracy and trustworthiness of data across nodes.
zh

[AI-16] MMKB-RAG : A Multi-Modal Knowledge-Based Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework

【速读】：该论文旨在解决现有大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）及其多模态版本依赖参数化知识所导致的生成信息过时以及错误内容风险增加的问题。此外，虽然检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）部分缓解了这些问题，但其对数据库和检索系统的依赖可能引入无关或不准确的文档，从而损害性能与推理质量。为此，本文提出了一种新的多模态知识库检索增强生成框架（Multi-Modal Knowledge-Based Retrieval-Augmented Generation, MMKB-RAG），其关键在于利用模型的固有知识边界动态生成语义标签以优化检索过程，并通过联合过滤机制保留最相关且准确的参考文档，从而显著提升基于知识的视觉问答任务中的性能与鲁棒性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10074
作者: Zihan Ling,Zhiyao Guo,Yixuan Huang,Yi An,Shuai Xiao,Jinsong Lan,Xiaoyong Zhu,Bo Zheng
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) and multi-modal LLMs have been remarkable. However, these models still rely solely on their parametric knowledge, which limits their ability to generate up-to-date information and increases the risk of producing erroneous content. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) partially mitigates these challenges by incorporating external data sources, yet the reliance on databases and retrieval systems can introduce irrelevant or inaccurate documents, ultimately undermining both performance and reasoning quality. In this paper, we propose Multi-Modal Knowledge-Based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (MMKB-RAG), a novel multi-modal RAG framework that leverages the inherent knowledge boundaries of models to dynamically generate semantic tags for the retrieval process. This strategy enables the joint filtering of retrieved documents, retaining only the most relevant and accurate references. Extensive experiments on knowledge-based visual question-answering tasks demonstrate the efficacy of our approach: on the E-VQA dataset, our method improves performance by +4.2% on the Single-Hop subset and +0.4% on the full dataset, while on the InfoSeek dataset, it achieves gains of +7.8% on the Unseen-Q subset, +8.2% on the Unseen-E subset, and +8.1% on the full dataset. These results highlight significant enhancements in both accuracy and robustness over the current state-of-the-art MLLM and RAG frameworks.
zh

[AI-17] Pay Attention to What and Where? Interpretable Feature Extractor in Vision-based Deep Reinforcement Learning

【速读】：本文针对传统卷积神经网络（CNNs）在空间维度上的局限性展开研究，特别是现有可解释深度强化学习（Explainable Deep Reinforcement Learning）方法中注意力掩码与视觉输入中对象的空间偏移问题。论文的关键在于提出了一种名为可解释特征提取器（Interpretable Feature Extractor, IFE）的架构，旨在生成准确的注意力掩码，以同时说明智能体在空间域中“关注什么”以及“关注哪里”。IFE 包含两个核心模块：Human-Understandable Encoding 模块用于生成完全可解释的注意力掩码，Agent-Friendly Encoding 模块则通过优化智能体的学习效率来增强模型性能。最终，IFE 在基于视觉的深度强化学习中实现了模型的可解释性，并确保生成的注意力掩码在空间维度上一致且高度直观，能够有效突出视觉输入中的重要对象或位置。该方法通过将 IFE 集成到 Rainbow 和 Asynchronous Advantage Actor-Critic 模型中，在 57 个 ATARI 游戏任务上的实验验证了其在空间一致性、可解释性和数据效率方面的有效性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10071
作者: Tien Pham,Angelo Cangelosi
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Current approaches in Explainable Deep Reinforcement Learning have limitations in which the attention mask has a displacement with the objects in visual input. This work addresses a spatial problem within traditional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We propose the Interpretable Feature Extractor (IFE) architecture, aimed at generating an accurate attention mask to illustrate both “what” and “where” the agent concentrates on in the spatial domain. Our design incorporates a Human-Understandable Encoding module to generate a fully interpretable attention mask, followed by an Agent-Friendly Encoding module to enhance the agent’s learning efficiency. These two components together form the Interpretable Feature Extractor for vision-based deep reinforcement learning to enable the model’s interpretability. The resulting attention mask is consistent, highly understandable by humans, accurate in spatial dimension, and effectively highlights important objects or locations in visual input. The Interpretable Feature Extractor is integrated into the Fast and Data-efficient Rainbow framework, and evaluated on 57 ATARI games to show the effectiveness of the proposed approach on Spatial Preservation, Interpretability, and Data-efficiency. Finally, we showcase the versatility of our approach by incorporating the IFE into the Asynchronous Advantage Actor-Critic Model.
zh

[AI-18] CHARM: Calibrating Reward Models With Chatbot Arena Scores

【速读】：本文旨在解决奖励模型（Reward Models, RMs）在从人类反馈中进行强化学习时存在的模型偏好偏差问题，即RMs倾向于对特定策略模型生成的响应赋予过高的分数，这种偏差会导致排名评估失真及不公平判断。为了解决这一问题，论文提出了一种名为CHatbot Arena校准奖励建模（CHARM）的校准方法，该方法利用Chatbot Arena排行榜中的Elo评分来缓解奖励模型的过高评价现象。此外，还引入了不匹配度（Mismatch Degree）指标来量化这种偏好偏差。关键在于，CHARM方法仅需少量的偏好数据即可完成奖励模型的持续训练，从而实现高效且通用的公平性提升与可靠性增强。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10045
作者: Xiao Zhu,Chenmien Tan,Pinzhen Chen,Rico Sennrich,Yanlin Zhang,Hanxu Hu
机构: 未知
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Reward models (RMs) play a crucial role in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback by serving as proxies for human preferences in aligning large language models. In this paper, we identify a model preference bias in RMs, where they systematically assign disproportionately high scores to responses from certain policy models. This bias distorts ranking evaluations and leads to unfair judgments. To address this issue, we propose a calibration method named CHatbot Arena calibrated Reward Modeling (CHARM) that leverages Elo scores from the Chatbot Arena leaderboard to mitigate RM overvaluation. We also introduce a Mismatch Degree metric to measure this preference bias. Our approach is computationally efficient, requiring only a small preference dataset for continued training of the RM. We conduct extensive experiments on reward model benchmarks and human preference alignment. Results demonstrate that our calibrated RMs (1) achieve improved evaluation accuracy on RM-Bench and the Chat-Hard domain of RewardBench, and (2) exhibit a stronger correlation with human preferences by producing scores more closely aligned with Elo rankings. By mitigating model preference bias, our method provides a generalizable and efficient solution for building fairer and more reliable reward models.
zh

[AI-19] EmbodiedAgent : A Scalable Hierarchical Approach to Overcome Practical Challenge in Multi-Robot Control

【速读】：该论文旨在解决异构多机器人控制中的幻觉（hallucination）问题，特别是在不切实际的任务中，这种问题会导致错误的决策和执行。论文的关键创新在于提出了一种名为EmbodiedAgent的分层框架，它结合了下一动作预测范式与结构化记忆系统，将任务分解为可执行的机器人技能，并动态验证动作是否符合环境约束。此外，论文引入了MultiPlan+数据集和Robot Planning Assessment Schema (RPAS) 评估方法，进一步支持模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性与实用性验证。这些方案的核心在于通过动态环境交互与多层次规划能力，有效缓解幻觉问题，提升长期目标协调能力。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10030
作者: Hanwen Wan,Yifei Chen,Zeyu Wei,Dongrui Li,Zexin Lin,Donghao Wu,Jiu Cheng,Yuxiang Zhang,Xiaoqiang Ji
机构: 未知
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces EmbodiedAgent, a hierarchical framework for heterogeneous multi-robot control. EmbodiedAgent addresses critical limitations of hallucination in impractical tasks. Our approach integrates a next-action prediction paradigm with a structured memory system to decompose tasks into executable robot skills while dynamically validating actions against environmental constraints. We present MultiPlan+, a dataset of more than 18,000 annotated planning instances spanning 100 scenarios, including a subset of impractical cases to mitigate hallucination. To evaluate performance, we propose the Robot Planning Assessment Schema (RPAS), combining automated metrics with LLM-aided expert grading. Experiments demonstrate EmbodiedAgent’s superiority over state-of-the-art models, achieving 71.85% RPAS score. Real-world validation in an office service task highlights its ability to coordinate heterogeneous robots for long-horizon objectives.
zh

[AI-20] Session-based Recommender Systems: User Interest as a Stochastic Process in the Latent Space

【速读】：该论文旨在解决会话推荐系统中的数据不确定性、流行度偏差以及曝光偏差问题。论文通过研究这些偏差在项目嵌入（item embeddings）及推荐结果中的表现，提出将用户兴趣建模为潜在空间中的随机过程，并提供了一种与模型无关的数学概念实现方法。解决方案的关键在于引入三个要素：通过正则化实现嵌入均匀性来去偏项目嵌入、从会话前缀建模密集的用户兴趣，以及在数据中引入虚拟目标以模拟扩展的曝光。实验结果显示，所提方法能够有效缓解上述挑战。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10005
作者: Klaudia Balcer,Piotr Lipinski
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper jointly addresses the problem of data uncertainty, popularity bias, and exposure bias in session-based recommender systems. We study the symptoms of this bias both in item embeddings and in recommendations. We propose treating user interest as a stochastic process in the latent space and providing a model-agnostic implementation of this mathematical concept. The proposed stochastic component consists of elements: debiasing item embeddings with regularization for embedding uniformity, modeling dense user interest from session prefixes, and introducing fake targets in the data to simulate extended exposure. We conducted computational experiments on two popular benchmark datasets, Diginetica and YooChoose 1/64, as well as several modifications of the YooChoose dataset with different ratios of popular items. The results show that the proposed approach allows us to mitigate the challenges mentioned.
zh

[AI-21] GenTe: Generative Real-world Terrains for General Legged Robot Locomotion Control

【速读】：该论文旨在解决双足机器人在多样化真实地形中行走这一基础性挑战，现有方法依赖预定义的高度图和静态环境，难以应对非结构化地形的复杂性。为弥合这一差距，论文提出了一种名为GenTe的框架，其关键是通过利用视觉-语言模型（Vision-Language Models, VLMs）的功能调用技术和推理能力，从文本和图形输入中生成物理上真实的、可适应的地形，以训练具有泛化能力的运动策略。GenTe构建了一个包含几何地形和物理地形的原子地形库，并引入了逼真的力建模来捕捉地形交互中的土壤下沉和水动力阻力等效应。这是首个系统性生成下肢机器人运动控制仿真环境的框架，并通过一个包含100个生成地形的基准测试验证了其提升双足机器人运动的泛化性和鲁棒性的效果。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09997
作者: Hanwen Wan,Mengkang Li,Donghao Wu,Yebin Zhong,Yixuan Deng,Zhenglong Sun,Xiaoqiang Ji
机构: 未知
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Developing bipedal robots capable of traversing diverse real-world terrains presents a fundamental robotics challenge, as existing methods using predefined height maps and static environments fail to address the complexity of unstructured landscapes. To bridge this gap, we propose GenTe, a framework for generating physically realistic and adaptable terrains to train generalizable locomotion policies. GenTe constructs an atomic terrain library that includes both geometric and physical terrains, enabling curriculum training for reinforcement learning-based locomotion policies. By leveraging function-calling techniques and reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), GenTe generates complex, contextually relevant terrains from textual and graphical inputs. The framework introduces realistic force modeling for terrain interactions, capturing effects such as soil sinkage and hydrodynamic resistance. To the best of our knowledge, GenTe is the first framework that systemically generates simulation environments for legged robot locomotion control. Additionally, we introduce a benchmark of 100 generated terrains. Experiments demonstrate improved generalization and robustness in bipedal robot locomotion.
zh

[AI-22] owards Unbiased Federated Graph Learning: Label and Topology Perspectives

【速读】：该论文致力于解决联邦图学习（Federated Graph Learning, FGL）中公平性被忽视的问题。尽管现有方法在整体节点分类准确性上有所提升，但它们往往未能充分考虑节点特征、标签及图结构的复杂性，导致在少数类节点或存在异质连接（邻居具有不同标签或误导性特征）的节点上的性能显著下降。这种现象揭示了一个关键问题：高总体准确率可能掩盖了对结构性或语义上边缘化节点性能的退化。

为了解决这一问题，论文提出了两个公平性目标：（1）改善少数类节点的表示以实现类别级公平；（2）缓解由异质连接引起的拓扑偏见以实现拓扑感知公平。论文的关键解决方案是FairFGL框架，它通过细粒度图挖掘与协作学习来增强公平性。客户端采用History-Preserving模块防止过拟合到主导本地类别，使用Majority Alignment模块优化异质多数类节点的表示，并利用Gradient Modification模块将少数类知识从结构有利的客户端转移到其他客户端。服务器端则仅上传最具影响力的参数子集以减少通信成本并更好地反映本地分布，同时结合基于聚类的聚合策略协调冲突更新并抑制全局多数类主导。广泛评估表明，FairFGL显著提升了少数群体的表现，在八个基准数据集上实现了最高达22.62%的Macro-F1增益，并在收敛性上超越了现有最先进方法。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09963
作者: Zhengyu Wu,Boyang Pang,Xunkai Li,Yinlin Zhu,Daohan Su,Bowen Fan,Rong-Hua Li,Guoren Wang,Chenghu Zhou
机构: 未知
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Databases (cs.DB); Social and Information Networks (cs.SI)
备注: Under Review

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Federated Graph Learning (FGL) enables privacy-preserving, distributed training of graph neural networks without sharing raw data. Among its approaches, subgraph-FL has become the dominant paradigm, with most work focused on improving overall node classification accuracy. However, these methods often overlook fairness due to the complexity of node features, labels, and graph structures. In particular, they perform poorly on nodes with disadvantaged properties, such as being in the minority class within subgraphs or having heterophilous connections (neighbors with dissimilar labels or misleading features). This reveals a critical issue: high accuracy can mask degraded performance on structurally or semantically marginalized nodes. To address this, we advocate for two fairness goals: (1) improving representation of minority class nodes for class-wise fairness and (2) mitigating topological bias from heterophilous connections for topology-aware fairness. We propose FairFGL, a novel framework that enhances fairness through fine-grained graph mining and collaborative learning. On the client side, the History-Preserving Module prevents overfitting to dominant local classes, while the Majority Alignment Module refines representations of heterophilous majority-class nodes. The Gradient Modification Module transfers minority-class knowledge from structurally favorable clients to improve fairness. On the server side, FairFGL uploads only the most influenced subset of parameters to reduce communication costs and better reflect local distributions. A cluster-based aggregation strategy reconciles conflicting updates and curbs global majority dominance . Extensive evaluations on eight benchmarks show FairFGL significantly improves minority-group performance , achieving up to a 22.62 percent Macro-F1 gain while enhancing convergence over state-of-the-art baselines.
zh

[AI-23] Privacy Meets Explainability: Managing Confidential Data and Transparency Policies in LLM -Empowered Science

【速读】：该论文旨在解决大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）在科学工作流程中使用时引发的数据保密性和伦理处理问题，特别是通过LLM驱动的科学工具可能无意中泄露包括知识产权和专有数据在内的机密信息的风险。论文的关键解决方案是提出“DataShield”框架，该框架能够检测机密数据泄露、总结隐私政策并可视化数据流，从而确保与组织政策和程序的一致性。其核心目标是提高科学家对数据处理实践的认识，支持他们做出知情决策以保护敏感信息。目前，与科学家合作进行的用户研究正在评估该框架的可用性、可信度以及应对实际隐私挑战的有效性。

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.09961
作者: Yashothara Shanmugarasa,Shidong Pan,Ming Ding,Dehai Zhao,Thierry Rakotoarivelo
机构: 未知
